title: 'Anti-ICE' Army veteran set fire outside Manhattan federal building, say officials
english: A former US Army soldier named Andrew Arrabaca was arrested after attacking a federal office building in Manhattan with fireworks, a pellet gun, and multiple weapons including a machete. The suspect, who expressed anti-government and anti-ICE views during the incident, caused a fire at the building's entrance. Three people, including government staff and a visitor, suffered minor injuries before security personnel successfully detained the man.
amharic: አንድ የቀድሞ የአሜሪካ ጦር ወታደር አንድሪው አራባካ፣ በኒውዮርክ ማንሃተን በሚገኝ የፌደራል ቢሮ ላይ በተኩስ፣ በርችቶች እና በተለያዩ የጦር መሳሪያዎች ጥቃት በመሰንዘሩ በቁጥጥር ስር ውሏል። ተጠርጣሪው በድርጊቱ ወቅት መንግስትን እና የኢሚግሬሽን ተቋሙን የሚቃወሙ ንግግሮችን በማሰማት በህንጻው መግቢያ ላይ እሳት ለኩሷል። በዚህ ድርጊት የሁለት የመንግስት ሰራተኞችን ጨምሮ ሶስት ሰዎች ቀላል ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል።
oromo: Andrew Arrabaca jedhamu kan duraan waraana Ameerikaa keessa tajaajilaa ture, godina Manhattaniitti gamoo biiroo federaalaa irratti miillaqa, qawwee xiyyaa fi meeshaalee waraanaa garaa garaatiin haleellaa raawwatee qabameera. Namichi kun yeroo haleellaa sanaa yaada mootummaa fi dhaabbata ICE mormu ibsaa erga turee booda, balbala gamootichaa duratti ibidda qabsiiseera. Haleellaa kanaan namoonni sadii, kanneen keessaa hojjettoonni mootummaa lama, miidhaa salphaan irra ga'eera.

title: Israeli forces open fire on children in Syrian village
english: Israeli military forces reportedly shot at a group of villagers in southern Syria, resulting in injuries to two children. The incident was reported by the Syrian state news agency, SANA. Local authorities are addressing the aftermath of this unprovoked attack on civilians.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በደቡባዊ ሶሪያ በሚገኝ አንድ መንደር ውስጥ በነዋሪዎች ላይ ተኩስ በመክፈታቸው ሁለት ህፃናት መጎዳታቸው ተዘግቧል። ይህንኑ መረጃ የሶሪያ መንግስት የዜና ወኪል (SANA) ይፋ አድርጓል። በሲቪል ነዋሪዎች ላይ የተፈፀመውን ይህን ጥቃት ተከትሎ አስፈላጊው ክትትል እየተደረገ ነው።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Israa'el ganda kibba Soriyaa keessatti argamu tokko keessatti namoota nagaa irratti dhukaasa banuun isaanii gabaasameera. Dhukaasa kanaan ijoolleen lama miidhamuu isaanii gabaasni dhaabbata oduu mootummaa Soriyaa (SANA) ibseera. Namoota nagaa irratti haleellaa raawwatame kana hordofee tarkaanfiin barbaachisaan fudhatamaa jira.

title: Bangladesh face Australia Test might as Cummins, Hazlewood and Lyon return
english: Australia has announced a 13-man squad for their upcoming two-Test series against Bangladesh, featuring the return of key players Pat Cummins, Josh Hazlewood, and Nathan Lyon from injury. While the team is now at full strength, selectors have not yet confirmed if the 'big four' bowlers will play together, especially given the strong recent performance of Scott Boland. This series marks a new chapter for the team following the retirement of opening batter Usman Khawaja.
amharic: አውስትራሊያ ከባንግላዴሽ ጋር ለሚኖራት የሁለት የሙከራ ጨዋታዎች ተከታታይ ውድድር 13 አባላት ያሉት ቡድን ይፋ አድርጋለች። ለረጅም ጊዜ በጉዳት ምክንያት ከሜዳ የራቁት ፓት ኩሚንስ፣ ጆሽ ሃዘልዉድ እና ናታን ሊዮን ወደ ቡድኑ ተመልሰዋል። የቡድኑ አሰልጣኞች አራቱም ዋና ዋና የቡድኑ አጥቂዎች በአንድነት ስለመሰለፋቸው እርግጠኛ ባይሆኑም፣ የቡድኑ ጥልቀት ግን በቂ መሆኑን ገልጸዋል። ይህ ውድድር የኡስማን ካዋጃ ከጡረታ መውጣት በኋላ ቡድኑ ለሚያደርጋቸው ለውጦች መነሻ ይሆናል።
oromo: Awustiraaliyaan tapha 'Test' lama kan isheen biyya Baangilaadesh wajjin gootuuf, garee miseensota 13 qabu ifoomsiteetti. Garee kana keessatti taphattoonni gurguddoon akka Paat Kumiins, Joosh Haazelwuud fi Naataan Liyooyn miidhaa irraa fayyanii deebi'aniiru. Gareen kun amma cimee kan jiru yoo ta'u, leenjistoonni garuu taphattoonni ijoo kunneen hundi waliin hiriiruufi dhiisuusaanii ammayyuu hin mirkaneessine. Taphoonni kunneen erga Usman Kaawaajaan tapha keessaa ba'ee booda, garee Awustiraaliyaatiif ce'umsa haaraa ta'a jedhamee eegama.

title: Moment terrifying floodwaters sweep through Afghan village
english: Severe flooding has struck the Nuristan province in Afghanistan, resulting in at least 20 confirmed deaths. More than 100 people are currently listed as missing following the disaster. Local residents are actively digging through mud and debris in hopes of finding survivors.
amharic: በአፍጋኒስታን ኑሪስታን ግዛት በደረሰ ከፍተኛ የጎርፍ አደጋ ቢያንስ 20 ሰዎች ሕይወታቸው አልፏል። በአደጋው ከ100 በላይ ሰዎች የት እንዳሉ አይታወቅም። የአካባቢው ነዋሪዎች የተረፉ ሰዎችን ለመፈለግ በጭቃ እና በፍርስራሽ ውስጥ የፍለጋ ስራ እያከናወኑ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Afgaanistaan kutaa Nuristaanitti lolaa cimaa hordofee lubbuun namoota 20 ol darbeera. Namoonni 100 ol ta'an ammoo bakka bu'an hin beekamu. Jiraattonni naannichaa namoota lubbuun hafan barbaaduuf biyyee fi caccabaa manaa keessa wal-gargaaruun tattaaffii gochaa jiru.

title: Five Palestinians die in fire after Israeli attack in Gaza
english: An Israeli airstrike hit an apartment building in Gaza City, resulting in a fire that killed five people. Among those who perished were three children who were trapped by the blaze. This attack reportedly violates the ongoing ceasefire agreement in the region.
amharic: በጋዛ ከተማ በተፈጸመ የእስራኤል የአየር ጥቃት በመኖሪያ ሕንፃ ላይ የእሳት አደጋ ተከስቶ አምስት ሰዎች ሕይወታቸው አልፏል። ከተጎጂዎቹ መካከል ከእሳቱ ማምለጥ ያልቻሉ ሦስት ሕጻናት ይገኙበታል። ይህ ጥቃት በክልሉ የተደረሰውን የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት የሚጥስ መሆኑ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Humni waraana Israa'el magaalaa Gaazaa keessatti manni jireenyaa tokko irratti xiyyaaraan haleellaa raawwataniin, ibidda ka'een namoonni shan lubbuun isaanii darbeera. Namoota du'an keessaa ijoolleen sadii ibidda keessaa ba'uu dadhabuun isaanii gabaasameera. Haleellaan kun waliigaltee dhaabbii waraanaa naannichatti taasifame kan cabsu ta'uun ibsameera.

title: World Cup: Messi thanks Argentina fans but ‘wound will take time to heal’
english: Lionel Messi shared his heartbreak following Argentina's 1-0 loss to Spain in the 2026 World Cup final. While acknowledging the pain of missing out on a second consecutive title, he expressed gratitude to his fans and pride in his team's hard work. Messi did not confirm his retirement, though the match is widely considered his final appearance in the tournament.
amharic: ሊዮኔል ሜሲ በአርጀንቲና እና በስፔን መካከል በተካሄደው የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ አርጀንቲና 1 ለ 0 ከተሸነፈች በኋላ የተሰማውን ጥልቅ ሀዘን ገልጿል። ሁለተኛ ተከታታይ ዋንጫ ማግኘት ባለመቻሉ የተሰማውን ህመም ቢገልጽም፣ ለደጋፊዎቹ ምስጋናውን አቅርቦ የቡድኑን ጥረት አድንቋል። ይህ ጨዋታ የሜሲ የመጨረሻ የዓለም ዋንጫ ተሳትፎ እንደሆነ ቢነገርም፣ ተጫዋቹ ግን በይፋ ጡረታ መውጣቱን እስካሁን አላረጋገጠም።
oromo: ሊዮኔል ሜሲ የአርጀንቲና ብሔራዊ ቡድን በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ በስፔን 1 ለ 0 ከተሸነፈ በኋላ የተሰማውን ከፍተኛ ሃዘን ገልጿል። ምንም እንኳን ተከታታይ ሁለተኛ ዋንጫውን ማግኘት ባለመቻሉ የተሰማውን ህመም ቢገልጽም፣ ለደጋፊዎቹ ምስጋናውን አቅርቦ የቡድኑን ትጋት አድንቋል። ይህ ጨዋታ የሜሲ የመጨረሻ የዓለም ዋንጫ ተሳትፎ እንደሆነ በሰፊው ቢነገርም፣ ተጫዋቹ ግን በይፋ ከዓለም ዋንጫ ውድድር መገለሉን እስካሁን አላረጋገጠም።

title: Jordan says it neutralised incoming Iranian drones
english: Jordanian military forces successfully blocked five drones sent by Iran on Tuesday. This incident follows reports from Iran’s Revolutionary Guard claiming to have targeted various American military assets within Jordan. The intercepted aerial devices were neutralized by Jordanian air defense systems.
amharic: የዮርዳኖስ ወታደራዊ ኃይል ማክሰኞ ዕለት ከኢራን የተላኩ አምስት ድሮኖችን መትቶ መጣሉን አስታውቋል። ይህ ክስተት የተከሰተው የኢራን አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ በዮርዳኖስ ውስጥ የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ተቋማትን ማጥቃቱን ከገለጸ በኋላ ነው። የተጠቀሱት የአየር ላይ መሳሪያዎች በዮርዳኖስ የአየር መከላከያ ስርዓት አማካኝነት በቁጥጥር ስር ውለዋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyyaa Yordaanos Kibxata darbe xiyyoorraa malee balali'an shan kan Iran irraa dhufan akka rukute beeksiseera. Kanas kan ta'e, waraanni Iran kan IRGC jedhamu buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa kan Yordaanos keessa jiran irratti haleellaa raawwachuu isaa erga ibsee booda. Xiyyoorraa malee balali'an kunneenis sirna ittisa qilleensa biyyattii kanaan kuffifamaniiru.

title: Israel bombs southern Lebanese town: Report
english: Israeli military forces have carried out a significant aerial bombardment on the town of Kfar Tebnit in southern Lebanon. This event was reported by the Lebanese National News Agency, highlighting a major escalation in the region. Local authorities and media continue to monitor the situation following these attacks.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በደቡባዊ ሊባኖስ በምትገኘው ከፋር ተብኒት ከተማ ላይ ከፍተኛ የቦምብ ጥቃት አድርሰዋል። ይህንን ክስተት የሊባኖስ ብሄራዊ የዜና አገልግሎት የዘገበው ሲሆን፣ ይህም በአካባቢው ያለውን የፀጥታ ውጥረት እንዳባባሰው ተገልጿል። ጉዳዩን በተመለከተ ተጨማሪ መረጃዎችን ለማግኘት የዜና ምንጮች ክትትል እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Humnoota waraana Israa’el magaalaa Kibba Libaanos, Kfar Tebnit irratti haleellaa boombii cimaa geggeessaniiru. Odeeffannoon kun kan dhiyaate gabaasa dhaabbata oduu biyyaalessaa Libaanos irraa yoo ta’u, kunis naannichatti waraanni akka daran hammaate kan mul’isuudha. Oduun kun hordofamaa jiraachuun ibsameera.

title: Why are there sanctions on Iran and when could they be lifted?
english: Former President Donald Trump is pushing to increase financial penalties against Iran by incorporating them into existing legislation targeting Russia. These sanctions, which have crippled Iran's economy and oil trade, were originally implemented in 1979 and expanded over the decades due to concerns over nuclear development and regional conflicts. Currently, these measures are used by the US as leverage in ongoing diplomatic negotiations to limit Tehran's military and nuclear ambitions.
amharic: ቀድሞ የነበሩት የአሜሪካ ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በኢራን ላይ የሚጣለውን የኢኮኖሚ ማዕቀብ ለማጠናከር እየሞከሩ ነው። እነዚህ ማዕቀቦች ኢራን ነዳጅ እንዳትሸጥና ከአለም አቀፍ የፋይናንስ ተቋማት ጋር እንዳትሰራ በመከልከል ኢኮኖሚዋን በእጅጉ ጎድተዋል። ማዕቀቡ የተጀመረው ከ1979 ጀምሮ ሲሆን አሜሪካ በዋናነት የምትጠቀመው የኢራንን የኑክሌር ፕሮግራም ለመቆጣጠር እንደ መደራደሪያ መሳሪያ ነው።
oromo: Pirezedantiin duraanii Donald Tiraamp Iran irratti adabbii diinagdee jiru caalaatti jabeessuuf yaada dhiyeessaniiru. Adabbiin kun diinagdee fi daldala boba'aa Iran miidhuun, biyyattiin sirna faayinaansii addunyaa irraa akka adda baatu taasiseera. Adabbiin kun bara 1979 kan jalqabame yoo ta'u, Ameerikaan isaan fayyadamtee sagantaa niwukilaraa Iran daangessuuf akka meeshaa daldalaatti itti fayyadamaa jirti.

title: How to stop US-Iran conflict from becoming endless war
english: Diplomatic efforts between the US and Iran have stalled, leading to a dangerous military escalation that is disrupting global oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz. The US has shifted its strategy toward a prolonged campaign of economic and military attrition, while Iran is mobilizing its forces to resist these pressures. This intensifying conflict threatens to spark a wider regional war as both nations prepare for a sustained, high-stakes confrontation.
amharic: በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል የነበረው ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ጥረት በመስተጓጎሉ፣ በሆርሙዝ ባህር ላይ የነዳጅ ማጓጓዣ መስመሮችን የሚያውክ ወታደራዊ ግጭት ተባብሷል። አሜሪካ ስልቷን ወደ ረጅም ጊዜ የኢኮኖሚ እና ወታደራዊ ጫና በማሸጋገር ላይ ስትሆን፣ ኢራንም ለዚሁ ግፊት ምላሽ ለመስጠት ወታደሮቿን በማሰባሰብ ላይ ትገኛለች። ይህ እየተባባሰ የመጣው ግጭት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ለረጅም ጊዜ የሚዘልቅ እና መላውን ክልል ሊያዳርስ የሚችል ጦርነት የመቀስቀስ ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Yaaliin dippilomaasii US fi Iraan gidduutti godhamaa ture fashaluun isaa, walitti bu'iinsa waraanaa bal'aa fi dhiyeessiin boba'aa addunyaa karaa daandii galaana Hormuz akka gufatu taasiseera. US tarsiimoo ishee gara duula dinagdee fi waraana dheeraatti kan geeddaratte yoo ta'u, Iraanis dhiibbaa kana of irraa ittisuuf humnoota ishee bobbaasuu jalqabdeetti. Walitti bu'iinsi cimaa kun biyyoota lamaan gidduutti waraana bal'aa naannichatti babal'achuu danda'uufi yaaddoo cimaa uumeera.

title: Lebanese army deploys in southern town after Israeli withdrawal, official says
english: Following a U.S.-brokered agreement, the Lebanese military has moved into the town of Zawtar al-Gharbiyeh in southern Lebanon. This deployment occurred immediately after Israeli forces pulled out of the area on Tuesday. The move marks a significant step in implementing the recent deal between the two nations.
amharic: በአሜሪካ አደራዳሪነት በተደረሰው ስምምነት መሰረት የሊባኖስ ወታደሮች በደቡባዊ ሊባኖስ በሚገኘው ዘውታር አል-ጋርቢያ ከተማ መግባት ጀምረዋል። ይህ እንቅስቃሴ የተደረገው የእስራኤል ኃይሎች አካባቢውን ለቀው ከወጡ በኋላ ወዲያውኑ ነው። ይህም በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል የተደረገውን ስምምነት ተግባራዊ ለማድረግ የተወሰደ እርምጃ ነው።
oromo: waliigaltee Ameerikaan giddu galeessa taatee irra ga'ame hordofuun, waraanni Libaanoos ganda Zawtar al-Gharbiyeh jedhamu kan kibba Libaanoositti argamu seeneera. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame waraanni Israa'eel naannichaa gadhiisee erga ba'ee boodadha. Kunis waliigaltee biyyoota lamaan gidduutti godhame hojiirra oolchuuf tarkaanfii guddaadha.

title: Many Christian voters in the US see Trump as ‘chosen’ by God to lead
english: A significant number of white evangelical Christians in the United States believe Donald Trump was divinely selected to lead the country, even though they acknowledge he does not act in a personally religious manner. Research indicates that 60 percent of this demographic feels his actions have moved the nation toward Christian values. This perspective highlights a growing tendency among these supporters to integrate their religious beliefs with their political preferences.
amharic: በአሜሪካ የሚገኙ በርካታ ነጭ ወንጌላውያን ክርስቲያኖች ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በግላቸው ሃይማኖተኛ ባይሆኑም በእግዚአብሔር የተመረጡ መሪ እንደሆኑ ያምናሉ። ጥናቶች እንደሚያሳዩት ከእነዚህ አማኞች መካከል 60 በመቶ የሚሆኑት ትራምፕ አገሪቱን ወደ ክርስቲያናዊ መርሆዎች እንዳቀረቧት ያስባሉ። ይህ አቋም የሃይማኖት እና የፖለቲካ አስተሳሰብ በደጋፊዎቹ ዘንድ እየተቀላቀለ መምጣቱን ያሳያል።
oromo: Amantoonni Kiristaana gosa 'evangelical' jedhaman hedduun Ameerikaa keessa jiran, Donald Traamp namoota amantii akka hin qabne beekanis, akka inni Waaqayyo biratti biyya bulchuuf filatameetti amanu. Qorannoon tokko akka ibsutti, harki 60 namoota kanaa, Traamp biyyattii gara duudhaa Kiristaanummaatti dhiyeessera jedhanii yaadu. Ilaalchi kun deggertoonni isaa amantii fi siyaasa walitti makuu akka jalqaban kan agarsiisuudha.

title: Argentina players receive heroes’ welcome home despite World Cup defeat
english: The Argentine national football team was greeted by massive crowds of supporters upon returning home following their World Cup defeat. Fans lined the streets to cheer for the players as they traveled from the airport to their association's headquarters. Although Lionel Messi did not participate in the trip and the team reportedly felt somber about the tournament result, the public still gathered in large numbers to show their appreciation.
amharic: የአርጀንቲና ብሄራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን ከዓለም ዋንጫ ሽንፈት በኋላ ወደ አገራቸው ሲመለሱ በደጋፊዎች ደማቅ አቀባበል ተደረገላቸው። ተጫዋቾቹ ከአውሮፕላን ማረፊያ ወደ ዋና መስሪያ ቤታቸው በሚያቀኑበት ወቅት በርካታ አድናቂዎች በመንገድ ላይ ተሰልፈው ድጋፋቸውን ገልጸዋል። ምንም እንኳን ሊዮኔል ሜሲ አብሮ ባይሄድም እና ቡድኑ በውጤቱ የተከፋ ቢሆንም፣ ህዝቡ ለቡድኑ ያለውን ክብር ለመግለጽ በአንድነት ወጥቷል።
oromo: Taphattoonni kubbaa miillaa biyya Arjantiinaa injifannoo dhabuu isaanitiin booda gara biyyatti deebi'anitti, ummanni baay'een simannaa ho'aa godheeraaf. Gareen kun buufata xiyyaaraa irraa gara waajjira isaaniitti imalaa osoo jiranu, deggartonni karaarratti hiriiranii gammachuu isaanii ibsataniiru. Lionel Messi imala kana keessatti kan hin hirmaanne ta'us, akkasumas gareen kun bu'aa taphichatti gadda kan itti dhaga'ame ta'us, ummanni baay'inaan bahuun kabaja isaanii agarsiisaniiru.

title: China and Philippines trade accusations after sailor injured at sea
english: Tensions between China and the Philippines have escalated following a violent confrontation near the Second Thomas Shoal that left a Philippine sailor injured. Manila accused Chinese forces of physically assaulting their personnel, while Beijing claims the Philippine boats acted aggressively by ramming their vessels. The United States has condemned China's actions, citing a pattern of behavior that threatens regional stability and maritime rights.
amharic: በቻይና እና በፊሊፒንስ መካከል ባለው የደቡብ ቻይና ባህር ግጭት፣ አንድ የፊሊፒንስ መርከበኛ ጉዳት ደርሶበታል። ማኒላ የቻይና የባህር ጠረፍ ጠባቂዎች በኃይል እንደተጠቀሙ ስትከስ፣ ቤጂንግ ግን የፊሊፒንስ ጀልባዎች ናቸው ግጭቱን የፈጠሩት በማለት ትከራከራለች። አሜሪካ በበኩሏ የቻይናን የጥቃት ድርጊት አውግዛ፣ ይህ አካሄድ በክልሉ ሰላም እና ደህንነት ላይ ስጋት እንደሚፈጥር ገልጻለች።
oromo: Waliigalteen gidduu Chaayinaa fi Filippiinsii jiru, walitti buiinsa bakka 'Second Thomas Shoal' jedhamutti uumameen booda hammaatee jira; walitti buiinsa kanaanis qondaalli Filippiinsii tokko miidhamaniiru. Maanilaa humnoonni Chaayinaa humnaan miidhaa geessisuu isaanii himattee, Chaayinaan garuu bidiroonni Filippiinsii akka isaanitti bu'an ibsiteetti. Ameerikaan gochaa Chaayinaa kana balaaleffachuun, tarkaanfiin kun nagaa naannichaa fi mirga qaxxaamura galaanaa kan miidhu ta'uu beeksisiteetti.

title: Morning update
english: The IRGC has targeted US military and data infrastructure across several Middle Eastern countries, leading the US to issue a global safety alert for its citizens. Meanwhile, a tanker was struck in the Strait of Hormuz, and Hamas appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new political leader. Additionally, the UN expressed alarm over Houthi threats to block shipping routes, which could destabilize global oil markets.
amharic: የኢራኑ አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ በኩዌት፣ በዮርዳኖስ እና በባህሬን በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ እና የመሠረተ ልማት ተቋማት ላይ ጥቃት አድርሷል፣ ይህም አሜሪካ በዓለም ዙሪያ ላሉ ዜጎቿ የጥንቃቄ ማስጠንቀቂያ እንድታወጣ አድርጓታል። በሌላ በኩል፣ በሆርሙዝ የባህር ሰላጤ አንድ የነዳጅ መርከብ ጥቃት እንደደረሰበት የተነገረ ሲሆን፣ ሃማስም የፖለቲካ ቢሮ መሪ አድርጎ ከሊል አል-ሃያይን መርጧል። በተያያዘም የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት ሁቲዎች በሳውዲ አረቢያ ላይ የባህር ማገጃ እንጥላለን በሚል ያሰሙት ስጋት በዓለም አቀፍ የነዳጅ ገበያ ላይ ተጽእኖ ሊፈጥር እንደሚችል አስጠንቅቋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyyaa Iraan (IRGC) biyyoota gara garaa keessatti buufataalee waraanaa fi daataa Ameerikaa irratti haleellaa raawwachuu isaa hordofee, Ameerikaan lammiilee ishee addunyaa maratti argamanif akeekkachiisa nageenyaa dabarsiteetti. Gama biraatiin, galaana Hormuz keessatti doonii boba’aa tokko irratti haleellaan kan raawwatame yoo ta’u, gareen Hamaas ammoo haliil al-Hayyaa hogganaa siyaasaa haaraa godhatanii filataniiru. Kana malees, gamtaan mootummoota gamtoomaniis gareen Hutiin sa'udii Arabiyaa irratti duula galaanaa akka banan dhadatan, gatii boba’aa fi diinagdee addunyaa irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisuu akka danda'u ibsaniiru.

title: 'You can neither threaten us, nor bribe us', Iran's Araghchi tells US, Israel
english: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi claims that his country has rejected various offers of bribes and threats from the United States and Israel. He asserted that Iran's nuclear enrichment program is not negotiable and remains unaffected by external pressure. Araghchi emphasized that Iran will not be intimidated and continues to stand by its long-standing policies.
amharic: የኢራን የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር አባስ አራግቺ አገራቸው ከአሜሪካ እና ከእስራኤል የቀረቡላቸውን ጉቦ እና ማስፈራሪያዎች ውድቅ ማድረጋቸውን ገልጸዋል። የኢራን የኑክሌር የበለጸገ ፕሮግራም ለድርድር እንደማይቀርብ እና በውጭ ጫና እንደማይቀየር አስታውቀዋል። አራግቺ አገራቸው በዛቻ እንደማትሸነፍ እና በቆዩ ፖሊሲዎቿ ላይ ጸንታ እንደምትቀጥል አጽንኦት ሰጥተዋል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Iraan Abbas Araghchi, biyyi isaanii dhiibbaa fi gowoomsaa Ameerikaa fi Israa'el irraa dhufe hundumaa diduu ishee ibsan. Sagantaan diinagdee niwukileeraa Iraan kan gurguramu miti jedhan. Araghchi akka ibsanitti, Iraan sodaachisoon ishee hin jilbeeffachiisu akkasumas imaammata ishee duraanii irratti jabaattee itti fufti.

title: Iran says it targeted several key US army assets in Kuwait
english: Iranian state media claims that its forces successfully struck three major American military sites located in Kuwait. The reported targets include a helicopter facility, navigation equipment, and various buildings across different U.S. bases. These actions represent a significant escalation in regional tensions between the two nations.
amharic: የኢራን የመንግስት ሚዲያዎች በኩዌት የሚገኙ ሶስት ዋና ዋና የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ መሠረተ ልማቶችን ኢላማ ማድረጋቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ጥቃቱ የሄሊኮፕተር ማቆሚያን፣ የመገናኛ አንቴናዎችን እና የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ሕንፃዎችን ያካተተ መሆኑ ተገልጿል። ይህ ድርጊት በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለውን የክልል ውጥረት በእጅጉ የሚያባብስ ነው።
oromo: Miidiyaaleen mootummaa Iraan akka gabaasanitti, humnoonni isaanii buufataalee waraana Ameerikaa Kuweyt keessa jiran sadan irratti haleellaa raawwataniiru. Haleellaan kun bakka heelikopteroonni itti dhaabbatan, meeshaalee daandii agarsiisan fi waajjiraalee waraana Ameerikaa kanneen biroo kan of keessatti qabatuudha. Tarkaanfiin kun hariiroo biyyoota lamaanii fi tasgabbii naannichaa irratti dhiibbaa cimaa uumuu danda'a.

title: US urges citizens 'exercise increased caution' amid Middle East conflict
english: The United States government has issued a global safety alert for its citizens due to rising tensions in the Middle East. Officials are warning that American travelers and diplomatic sites worldwide may face an increased risk of attacks. Citizens are advised to remain vigilant and avoid unnecessary travel to the region given the unpredictable nature of the current conflict.
amharic: በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ ባለው ከፍተኛ ውጥረት ምክንያት የአሜሪካ መንግስት ለዜጎቹ ዓለም አቀፍ የደህንነት ማስጠንቀቂያ አስተላልፏል። አሜሪካውያን ተጓዦች እና በአለም ዙሪያ የሚገኙ የዲፕሎማቲክ ተቋማት ለጥቃት የመጋለጥ እድላቸው ሰፊ እንደሆነ ባለስልጣናት አስታውቀዋል። አሁን ያለው ግጭት ባልታሰበ መልኩ ሊባባስ ስለሚችል፣ ዜጎች ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ እና ወደ አካባቢው የሚደረጉ አላስፈላጊ ጉዞዎችን እንዲያስወግዱ ተመክሯል።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa walitti bu’iinsa biyyoota giddu galeessa bahaa jiruun walqabatee lammiilee isaatiif akeekkachiisa nageenyaa addunyaa irraatti beeksisera. Namoonni Ameerikaa fi bakkeewwan bakka bu'oota biyyattii jiran hundi miidhaan irratti raawwatamuu akka malu ibsameera. Haalli amma jiru tasgabbii dhabuu danda'u waan ta'eef, lammiileen of eeggannoo akka godhanii fi gara naannichatti imaluu akka dhaaban gorfamaniiru.

title: US hits civilian area in Iran's Abdanan, state media reports
english: Iranian state media claims that a U.S. missile strike hit a civilian location near the city of Abdanan. Local officials reported that no one was injured during the incident. Emergency teams have been sent to the area to investigate the details of the attack.
amharic: የኢራን የመንግስት ሚዲያዎች እንዳስታወቁት የአሜሪካ ሚሳኤል በአብዳናን ከተማ አቅራቢያ በሚገኝ ሲቪል አካባቢ ላይ ጥቃት አድርሷል። የከተማዋ አስተዳዳሪ ጥቃቱ ምንም አይነት የሰው ህይወት እንዳልቀጠፈ ገልጸዋል። የነፍስ አድን ቡድኖች ወደ ስፍራው በመሄድ ስለ ጉዳዩ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Miidiyaaleen mootummaa Iraan akka gabaasanitti, miisayiliin Ameerikaa magaalaa Abdaanaan cinaatti argamu irratti haleellaa raawwatee jira. Bulchaan magaalattii akka ibsetti, haleellaa kanaan namni miidhame hin jiru. Gareewwan gargaarsaa gara naannichaa erigamanii haleellaa kana irratti qorannoo geggeessaa jiru.

title: Lebanese return to ‘pilot zone’ villages they say Israel never occupied
english: Residents of southern Lebanon are returning to their villages as part of a U.S.-brokered 'pilot zone' agreement where Israel is expected to withdraw from certain areas. However, locals and security sources argue that these specific villages were never actually occupied by Israeli forces. This has led to skepticism about the effectiveness of the deal, as many believe Israel is failing to provide real concessions while maintaining control over other invaded regions.
amharic: በአሜሪካ የተደራደረው የ'ሙከራ ዞን' ስምምነት አካል በመሆን የደቡብ ሊባኖስ ነዋሪዎች ወደ መንደሮቻቸው መመለስ ጀምረዋል። ይሁን እንጂ የአካባቢው ነዋሪዎች እና የጸጥታ ምንጮች እነዚህ መንደሮች በእስራኤል ኃይሎች ተይዘው እንደማያውቁ ይናገራሉ። ይህ ሁኔታ እስራኤል በእውነተኛ ስምምነቱ ላይ ትክክለኛውን ቦታ እየለቀቀች እንዳልሆነ በማመን በስምምነቱ ውጤታማነት ላይ ጥርጣሬ ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Uummati kibba Libaanoos waliigaltee 'naannoo qorannoo' kan Ameerikaan giddu galeessa taateen gara baadiyyaa isaaniitti deebi'uu jalqabaniiru. Haa ta'u malee, jiraattonni fi maddoonni nageenyaa naannoleen kun hundi humnoota Israa'eliin qabamanii akka hin beekne ibsaniiru. Kunis, Israa'el qe'ee qabattee jirtu gadhiisuu mannaa bakka biraa to'achuu isii irraa kan ka'e, amanamummaan waliigaltee kanaa akka shakkamu godheera.

title: Spain’s World Cup heroes welcomed by millions in Madrid
english: Millions of fans filled the streets of Madrid to celebrate the Spanish women's national football team following their World Cup victory over Argentina. The players were paraded through the city center on an open-top bus to showcase their trophy to the cheering crowd. This massive turnout highlights the immense national pride surrounding the team's historic achievement.
amharic: የስፔን የሴቶች ብሄራዊ ቡድን በአርጀንቲና ላይ የተቀዳጀውን የዓለም ዋንጫ ድል ተከትሎ በሚሊዮኖች የሚቆጠሩ የማድሪድ ነዋሪዎች ደስታቸውን ገልጸዋል። ተጫዋቾቹ ዋንጫቸውን ለደጋፊዎች ለማሳየት በከተማዋ መሀል በክፍት አውቶቡስ ጉብኝት አድርገዋል። ይህ ከፍተኛ የህዝብ ብዛት ለቡድኑ ታሪካዊ ድል ያለውን ታላቅ ሀገራዊ አድናቆት የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Garee kubbaa miillaa dubartoota Ispeen injifannoo Waancaa Addunyaa Arjentiinaa irratti argatan booda, namoonni miliyoonaan lakkaawwaman magaalaa Maadriditti gammachuu isaanii ibsataniiru. Taphattoonni kunniin waancaa isaanii deggertootaaf agarsiisuuf, magaalaa giddu galeessatti konkolaataa banamaa ta'een naanna'aniiru. Walgahii uummataa guddaan kun injifannoo seena qabeessa gareen kun argateef kabaja biyyoolessaa guddaa kan agarsiisuudha.

title: US military releases footage of tenth consecutive night of strikes on Iran
english: The United States Central Command has shared video evidence of its military conducting strikes against Iran for the tenth night in a row. These attacks have focused on destroying Iranian command centers, missile platforms, drone launching areas, and maritime defense infrastructure. This continuous operation represents a significant escalation in the ongoing regional military conflict.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ ለተከታታይ አስረኛ ቀን በአየር ላይ የፈፀመውን ጥቃት የሚያሳይ ምስል ይፋ አድርጓል። ጥቃቶቹ ኢላማ ያደረጉት የኢራንን የጦር ዕዝ ጣቢያዎች፣ ሚሳኤል ማስወንጨፊያዎችን፣ ድሮኖችን እና የባህር ኃይል መከላከያ መዋቅሮችን ነው። ይህ ተከታታይ ወታደራዊ እርምጃ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለውን ውጥረት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Ajajni giddugaleessa US fiilmii raayyaa ittisa biyyattii kan guyyaa kudhan walitti aansuun Iraan irratti haleellaa geggeessaa jiru agarsiisu gadhiiseera. Haleellaan kun kan xiyyeeffate giddugaleessa ajaja waraanaa, bakka gadi-lakkifama roketii fi doonii, akkasumas meeshaalee ittisa galaana irratti. Gochi waraanaa kun walitti bu'iinsa naannichaa daran kan hammaachiseedha.

title: Who is driving diplomacy in the Horn of Africa and the Red Sea, and why?
english: Key regional players including Egypt, Somalia, and Eritrea recently held diplomatic talks in Cairo alongside a U.S. envoy to address the shifting security landscape in the Horn of Africa and the Red Sea. The discussions highlight concerns over Ethiopia's increasing regional influence and maritime ambitions, which are directly impacting local stability and traditional alliances. These meetings demonstrate a collective push to coordinate security strategies as geopolitical competition for control over vital shipping routes and coastal access intensifies.
amharic: ግብጽ፣ ሶማሊያ፣ ኤርትራ እና የአሜሪካ ልዩ መልዕክተኛ በካይሮ ተሰባስበው በቀንዱ የአፍሪካ ቀንድ እና በቀይ ባህር የፀጥታ ጉዳዮች ላይ ተወያይተዋል። የውይይቱ ዋና ትኩረት የኢትዮጵያ የባህር በር ፍላጎት እና እየጨመረ የመጣው የክልል ተፅዕኖ በጎረቤት ሀገራት ደህንነት ላይ እያሳደረ ያለውን ተጽዕኖ መገምገም ነው። እነዚህ ሀገራት እያደገ የመጣውን የጂኦፖለቲካዊ ፉክክር ለመቋቋም እና የቀይ ባህርን የንግድ መስመር ደህንነት ለመጠበቅ የጋራ ጥረት ለማድረግ እየሰሩ ነው።
oromo: Itoophiyaa, Somaaliyaa, Eertiraa fi bakka bu'aan Ameerikaa dhimmoota nageenyaa gaanfa Afrikaa fi galaana Diimaa irratti mari'achuuf Kaayirootti wal ga'aniiru. Mariin kun kan xiyyeeffate fedhii Itoophiyaan kallattii galaanaa argachuuf qabduu fi dhiibbaa inni naannichaa irratti qabu irratti dha. Biyyoonni kunneen dorgommii siyaasaa fi nageenyaa naannichaa keessatti mul'atu to'achuuf akkasumas bakkaalee daldalaa barbaachisaa ta'an eeguuf waliigaltee cimaa uumuuf yaalii gochaa jiru.

title: Guyana recovers 27 bodies after ferry disaster as crew comes under scrutiny
english: Authorities in Guyana have recovered 27 bodies following the capsizing of the MV Barima ferry, which was carrying significantly more passengers than its official manifest indicated. The government has launched an investigation into the tragedy after the captain and another crew member tested positive for drug use. Officials are also addressing long-standing corruption allegations regarding the sale of unrecorded tickets at state-run ferry terminals.
amharic: በጋያና የMV ባሪማ ጀልባ በመስመጧ ምክንያት እስካሁን 27 አስከሬኖች ተገኝተዋል። ጀልባዋ ከተመዘገበው በላይ ብዙ ተሳፋሪዎችን ጭና እንደነበር የተገለጸ ሲሆን፣ ካፒቴኑ እና ሌላ አንድ ሰራተኛ በአደንዛዥ እጽ ምርመራ መያዛቸውን ተከትሎ መንግስት ምርመራ መጀመሩን አስታውቋል። ባለስልጣናት በጀልባ ማረፊያዎች በህገ-ወጥ መንገድ ትኬት ሲሸጥ እንደነበር የገለጹ ሲሆን፣ ጉዳዩን በጥብቅ እየተከታተሉት መሆኑን ተናግረዋል።
oromo: Guyana keessatti bidiruu MV Barima jedhamuun walqabatee namoota 27 ta'an lubbuun darbuun isaanii mirkanaa'eera. Bidiruun kun namoota galmee irratti ibsamaniin ol kan fe'e yoo ta'u, kabiteeniifi hojjettoonni biroo qorannoo fayyaa irratti qorichi sammuu namaa adoochuu argamuun isaanii erga mirkanaa'ee booda qorannoon eegalameera. Mootummaan buufataalee bidiruu keessatti tiketiin seeraan alaa gurguramaa turuu isaa hordofee tarkaanfii fudhachuuf akka jiru ibseera.

title: Iran war live: US launches 10th night of strikes; Tehran attacks Kuwait
english: The United States has conducted its tenth consecutive night of airstrikes against targets in Iran, including locations like Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island. This military action follows the deaths of three American soldiers, prompting President Trump to threaten significant retaliation. Additionally, reports indicate that Iranian forces have launched retaliatory attacks against Kuwait.
amharic: አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ለተከታታይ አስረኛ ቀን የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸሟን ቀጥላለች፤ ጥቃቱ በባንዳር አባስ እና በሌሎች የባህር ዳርቻ አካባቢዎች ላይ ያነጣጠረ ነው። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው ሦስት የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች መገደላቸውን ተከትሎ ሲሆን፣ ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕም ጠንካራ ምላሽ እንደሚሰጡ አስጠንቅቀዋል። በሌላ በኩል ኢራን በኩዌት ላይ ጥቃት መክፈቷ ተዘግቧል።
oromo: Ameerikaan guyyaa kudhanfaaf walitti aansuun bakkeewwan gurguddoo Iran keessatti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwachaa jirti. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame waraana Ameerikaa sadii erga ajjeefamanii booda yoo ta'u, Pireezidaant Traampis Iran adabbii cimaa akka argattu akeekkachiisaniiru. Gama biraatiin, waraanni Iran biyya Kuweet irratti haleellaa raawwachuun gabaafameera.

title: MSF demands Israel release detained Palestinian healthcare workers
english: Doctors Without Borders (MSF) has demanded that Israel immediately release Palestinian healthcare workers who are being held in harsh, unjustified conditions. The organization highlighted the ongoing abuse and solitary confinement of medical staff like Dr. Hussam Abu Safia, while reporting that hundreds of medics have been detained since October 2023. MSF criticized the international community's silence on the matter and insisted that all medical personnel must be freed and treated with dignity.
amharic: ዶክተሮች ያለ ድንበር (MSF) እስራኤል ያለምክንያት በግፍ የታሰሩ የፍልስጤም የጤና ባለሙያዎችን በአስቸኳይ እንድትለቅ ጠይቀዋል። ድርጅቱ እንደ ዶክተር ሁሳም አቡ ሳፊያ ያሉ የህክምና ባለሙያዎች በሰብአዊ መብት ጥሰት እና በብቸኝነት እስር እየተሰቃዩ መሆናቸውን በመግለጽ፣ ከጥቅምት 2023 ጀምሮ በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰራተኞች መታሰራቸውን አውግዟል። ዓለም አቀፍ ማህበረሰብ ዝምታውን በመተቸት፣ ሁሉም የህክምና ባለሙያዎች በአስቸኳይ እንዲፈቱ እና ሰብአዊ መብታቸው እንዲከበር ጠይቀዋል።
oromo: Dhaabbanni 'Doctors Without Borders' (MSF) Israa'el ogeeyyota fayyaa Falasxiin haala hamaa fi sababa malee hidhamanii jiran battaluma sanatti akka gadhiistu gaafate. Dhaabbatichi akkaataa ogeeyyota fayyaa kanneen akka Doktar Hussaam Abuu Saafiyaa itti qabaman fi hololchaa jiran balaaleffachuu wajjin, gartokkeen ogeeyyota fayyaa dhibbaan lakkaa'aman Onkololeessa 2023 irraa eegalee hidhaatti darbatamuu ibseera. Hawaasni idil-addunyaa dhimma kana irratti callisuu isaa kan ceepha'e MSF, ogeeyyotni fayyaa hundi battaluma sanatti hiikamanii mirgi isaanii kabajamuu akka qabu dhaameera.

title: Suspect charged in fatal attack on UK politician Ann Widdecombe
english: A 28-year-old man named Joshua Kerry has been charged with the murder of former UK politician Ann Widdecombe. Authorities discovered the 78-year-old deceased at her home earlier this month, and police are currently investigating whether the attack was politically motivated. This incident has raised significant alarms regarding the safety of public figures in Britain following several similar attacks over the last decade.
amharic: ጆሹዋ ኬሪ የተባለ የ28 ዓመት ወጣት የቀድሞዋ የብሪታንያ ፖለቲከኛ አን ዊዴኮምብን በመግደል ተከሰሰ። የ78 ዓመቷ ዊዴኮምብ በቤታቸው ሞተው የተገኙ ሲሆን፣ ፖሊስ ግድያው በፖለቲካዊ ምክንያት የተፈጸመ መሆኑን ለማረጋገጥ ምርመራ እያደረገ ነው። ይህ ክስተት ባለፉት አስር ዓመታት ውስጥ በብሪታንያ የተፈጸሙ ተመሳሳይ ጥቃቶችን ተከትሎ ለፖለቲከኞች ደህንነት ትልቅ ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Namni umriin isaa 28, Joshua Kerry jedhamu, siyaasaa UK duraanii Ann Widdecombe ajjeese jedhamee himatameera. Ann Widdecombe umriin isaanii 78 manatti du'anii argamaniiru; poolisiinis ajjeechaan kun kaka'umsa siyaasaa qabaachuu isaa qorachaa jira. Ajjeechaan kun waggoota kurnan darban keessa UK keessatti haleellaa wal-fakkaataa raawwatame hordofuun, tasgabbii fi nageenya namoota beekamoo irratti yaaddoo guddaa uumeera.

title: Argentina, minus Messi, return home after World Cup final heartbreak
english: The Argentine national football team has returned home following their defeat to Spain in the World Cup final. Although captain Lionel Messi and several teammates did not travel with the group, thousands of dedicated fans gathered in the rain to greet the squad at their training complex. Supporters expressed their pride and gratitude for the team's efforts despite the loss, continuing to show strong loyalty to their players.
amharic: የአርጀንቲና ብሔራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን በዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ለስፔን ከተሸነፈ በኋላ ወደ አገሩ ተመልሷል። የቡድኑ አምበል ሊዮኔል ሜሲ እና ጥቂት ተጫዋቾች አብረው ባይመጡም፣ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ደጋፊዎች በዝናብ ውስጥ በመሆን ቡድኑን በስልጠና ማዕከላቸው አቀባበል አድርገውላቸዋል። ደጋፊዎቹ ሽንፈቱ ቢኖርም ለቡድኑ ያላቸውን አድናቆት እና ፍቅር በመግለጽ ለተጫዋቾቹ ያላቸውን ታማኝነት አሳይተዋል።
oromo: Garee kubbaa miilaa biyyoolessa Arjantiinaa injifannoo isaan gita isaanitti Spain irraa dhibbaa booda gara biyyaatti deebi'aniiru. Kabajamoo kapiteenii isaanii Lionel Messi fi taphatoonni muraasni garee waliin yoo hin deebin, deggertoonni kumaatamaan lakka'aman rooba keessatti isaan simachuuf iddoo leenjii isaanii argamaniiru. Deggertoonni kun injifatamuu isaaniitiif gadda nutti dhaga'ame iyyuu, carraaqqii gareen isaanii godheef galata guddaa qabaachuu isaanii fi garee isaanii waliin dhaabachuu isaanii ibsaniiru.

title: Tanker hit off the coast of Oman, UK maritime agency says
english: A tanker ship was hit by an unidentified object near the coast of Oman in the Strait of Hormuz. The UK Maritime Trade Operations agency confirmed receiving several reports about the incident. Authorities are currently investigating the circumstances surrounding the attack.
amharic: በሆርሙዝ የባህር ወሽመጥ አቅራቢያ ኦማን የባህር ዳርቻ ላይ አንድ የነዳጅ ማመላለሻ መርከብ ባልታወቀ ነገር ተመታ። የዩኬ የባህር ላይ ንግድ ኦፕሬሽንስ ኤጀንሲ ስለ ጉዳዩ በርካታ ሪፖርቶች እንደደረሱት አረጋግጧል። በግጭቱ ዙሪያ ያለውን ሁኔታ ለማወቅ ምርመራ እየተካሄደ ይገኛል።
oromo: Dooniin boba'aa fe'u tokko galaana Omaan biratti mi’a namni hin beekneen rukutameera. Dhaabbanni daldala galaana UK akka ibsetti, waa'ee haleellaa kanaa gabaasawwan hedduu fudhachuu isaa mirkaneesseera. Ammaaf sababii haleellaa kanaa qulqulleeffachuuf qorannoon gaggeeffamaa jira.

title: TPLF’s New Proclamation Codifies a Police State
english: The TPLF has introduced a new regional law, Proclamation No. 366/2018, which grants the government extreme powers including warrantless arrests, media censorship, and the death penalty. Critics argue that this legislation is unconstitutional because regional states lack the authority to establish national defense or wartime policies. Furthermore, the council that enacted this law is considered illegitimate, raising serious concerns that these repressive measures will be enforced to suppress dissent and violate human rights in Tigray.
amharic: የህወሓት አዲስ አዋጅ ቁጥር 366/2018 ያለፍርድ ቤት ትዕዛዝ ማሰርን፣ የመገናኛ ብዙሃንን መቆጣጠርን እና የሞት ቅጣትን ጨምሮ እጅግ አፋኝ ስልጣኖችን ለመንግስት ይሰጣል። ተቺዎች እንደሚሉት፣ የክልል መንግስታት ብሔራዊ መከላከያን ወይም ጦርነትን የሚመለከቱ አዋጆችን የማውጣት ስልጣን ስለሌላቸው ይህ ህግ ህገ-ወጥ ነው። በተጨማሪም፣ ይህን አዋጅ ያወጣው ምክር ቤት ህጋዊ እውቅና የሌለው በመሆኑ፣ በክልሉ ውስጥ የሚኖሩ ዜጎች መብትና ነፃነት አደጋ ላይ እንደሚወድቅ ስጋቶች እየተነሱ ነው።
oromo: TPLF labsii haaraa lakkoofsa 366/2018 jedhamu baasee jira, labsii kunis mootummaaf humnaa fi mirga bal'aa kan akka malee qabuu fi adaba du'aa dabalatee mirga namoomaa kan sarbu dha. Qeeqonni akka jedhanitti, naannoleen labsii ittisa biyyaa ykn kan waraanaa baasuuf aangoo waan hin qabneef, labsii kun faallaa seeraa fi bu'uura motummaa federaalaati. Kana malees, qaamni labsii kana baase amanamummaa seeraa kan hin qabne waan ta'eef, tarkaanfiin kun ummata Tigraay irratti dhiibbaa fi cunqursaa hamaa akka fidu sodaatamaa jira.

title: Ethiopia Cannot Afford Another Disaster
english: The author warns that Ethiopia remains at risk of returning to catastrophic conflict if political leaders continue to rely on risky brinkmanship. While the Pretoria Agreement halted major fighting, its slow implementation has left the country in a state of deep instability and economic distress. Real peace requires courageous leadership capable of prioritizing long-term stability over inflammatory narratives to avoid another national tragedy.
amharic: ጸሐፊው የኢትዮጵያ ፖለቲካ መሪዎች አደገኛ የሆኑ የፖለቲካ ጨዋታዎችን የሚቀጥሉ ከሆነ አገሪቱ እንደገና ወደ አስከፊ ግጭት ልትገባ እንደምትችል ያስጠነቅቃሉ። የፕሪቶሪያው ስምምነት መጠነ ሰፊ ጦርነትን ቢያቆምም፣ ስምምነቱ በአግባቡ አለመፈጸሙ አገሪቱን በከፍተኛ አለመረጋጋት እና ኢኮኖሚያዊ ቀውስ ውስጥ እንድትቆይ አድርጓታል። ዘላቂ ሰላም ለመገንባት መሪዎች ከጥቅማቸው ይልቅ የአገሪቱን ሰላም በማስቀደም ድፍረት የተሞላበት ውሳኔ ሊወስዱ ይገባል።
oromo: Barreessichi akka akeekkachiisetti, hogganoonni siyaasaa Itiyoophiyaa amala wal-dorgommii fi wal-qorachuu yoo itti fufan biyyattiin gara waraana balaa geessisuutti deebi'uu dandeessi. Waliigalteen Pretooriyaa waraana guddaa dhaabsise illee, hojiirra oolmaan isaa laafaan biyyattiin tasgabbii dhabdee rakkoo diinagdee cimaa keessa akka jirtu godheera. Nagaa dhugaa mirkaneessuuf, hogganoonni fedhii dhuunfaa fi siyaasaa irra nageenya biyyaa dursee, murannoo fi ga’umsa qabaachuu qabu.

title: What are the new British Prime Minister’s biggest challenges?
english: Andy Burnham has officially taken office as the new Prime Minister of the United Kingdom. His immediate priority is to address the deep social, economic, and political divisions currently facing the country. Additionally, he faces pressure to clarify his administration's position regarding the ongoing conflict in Gaza while balancing internal national concerns.
amharic: አንዲ በረንሃም የእንግሊዝ አዲስ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው ተሹመዋል። አዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር በአገሪቱ ውስጥ የተከሰተውን ማህበራዊ፣ ኢኮኖሚያዊ እና ፖለቲካዊ መከፋፈል ለመፍታት ትልቅ ኃላፊነት ተጥሎባቸዋል። በተጨማሪም፣ በጋዛ እየተካሄደ ስላለው ጦርነት ያላቸውን አቋም እንዲገልጹ እና በአገር ውስጥ ጉዳዮች ላይ እንዲያተኩሩ ይጠበቃል።
oromo: Andii Berneham pirezidaantii mootummaa Biritish ta'uun muudameera. Hojii isaa isa jalqabaa fi gurguddaa keessaa inni tokko rakkoolee diinagdee, hawaasummaa fi siyaasaa biyyattii keessatti mul'achaa jiran furuu dha. Kana malees, waraana Gaazaa irratti ejjennoo isaa ibsuu fi dhimmoota biyya keessaa irratti xiyyeeffachuun isatti cimaa jira.

title: Chaos in India as ‘Cockroach activists’ march on parliament
english: A satirical online movement known as the 'Cockroach Janta Party' has evolved into a significant protest group in India. Thousands of supporters recently gathered to march on the parliament building to voice their opposition to Prime Minister Modi's administration. The situation turned chaotic as demonstrators attempted to enter the parliament grounds, leading to confrontations with local police.
amharic: በህንድ የ'ኮክሮች ጃንታ ፓርቲ' የተሰኘ አስቂኝ የመስመር ላይ እንቅስቃሴ ወደ ትልቅ የተቃውሞ ቡድን አድጓል። በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ደጋፊዎች በጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሞዲ አስተዳደር ላይ ያላቸውን ተቃውሞ ለመግለጽ ወደ ፓርላማው ህንፃ ሰልፍ ወጥተዋል። ሰልፈኞቹ የፓርላማውን ህንፃ ለመውረር ሲሞክሩ ሁኔታው ወደ ሁከት ተቀይሮ ከፖሊስ ጋር ግጭት ተፈጥሯል።
oromo: Sochii 'Cockroach Janta Party' jedhamu kan intarneetii irratti qoosuun jalqabe, amma garee mormii guddaa biyya Indiyaa keessatti mul'atu ta'eera. Deeggartoonni kumaan lakkaawwaman bulchiinsa Muummee Ministiraa Modi mormuuf gara mana maree bakka buutotaatti hiriira bahaniiru. Hiriirtotni kunneen gara mana maree seenuuf yaaluu isaanii hordofee jeequmsi uumamee poolisoota wajjin walitti bu'iinsi uumameera.

title: War on Iran: War resumes 30 days after MoU
english: A ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran has effectively collapsed after only one month. Renewed military hostilities, including American airstrikes and Iranian counter-attacks, have broken out across the Gulf region. These escalating tensions near the Strait of Hormuz are currently causing significant instability in global oil markets.
amharic: በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ እና በኢራን መካከል ለሰላሳ ቀናት የቆየው የተኩስ አቁም ስምምነት መፍረሱ ተዘግቧል። በአሁኑ ወቅት በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል የተחדሰው የአየር ጥቃትና የጦር እንቅስቃሴ በባህረ ሰላጤው አካባቢ ከፍተኛ ውጥረትን ፈጥሯል። ይህ በሆርሙዝ የባህር በር አቅራቢያ ያለው ግጭት በዓለም አቀፍ የነዳጅ ገበያ ላይ ስጋት ደቅኗል።
oromo: waliigalteen dhaabbii waraanaa ji'a tokko dura Ameerikaafi Iraan gidduutti godhame diigameera. Waraanniifi haleellaan qilleensa irraa gara walii garaatti taasifamuun naannoo Goolfii keessatti ammas qabatee jira. Jeeqamni kun daangaa galaana Hormuzitti dhihoo waan jiruuf, gabaa boba'aa addunyaa irratti dhiibbaa cimaa uumee jira.

title: Moroccan-born man dies while detained by police in Italy
english: A man of Moroccan origin named Abderrahim Fakir has died while in police custody in Bologna, Italy. A video capturing his struggle to breathe during the detention has circulated publicly, leading to widespread protests. Demonstrators are now calling for a formal investigation and accountability regarding the circumstances of his death.
amharic: አብደራሂም ፋኪር የተባሉ ሞሮኮ ተወላጅ በጣሊያን ቦሎኛ ከተማ በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር እያሉ ህይወታቸው አልፏል። ግለሰቡ በቁጥጥር ስር በነበሩበት ወቅት የመተንፈስ ችግር ሲገጥማቸው የሚያሳይ ቪዲዮ መሰራጨቱን ተከትሎ ከፍተኛ ተቃውሞ ተቀስቅሷል። ሰልፈኞቹ ስለ ሞታቸው ግልጽ ማብራሪያ እንዲሰጥ እና ተጠያቂነት እንዲኖር እየጠየቁ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Abderrahim Fakir kan jedhaman lammii Marookoo ta'an, magaalaa Boloonaa, Xaaliyaaniitti harka poolisii jiranitti du'aniiru. Viidiyoon haalli isaan itti qabaman fi harganuu dadhaban agarsiisu tamsa'uun isaa mormii guddaa kaaseera. Namoonni mormii dhageessisaa jiran waa'ee du'a isaanii qorannoo cimaa fi tarkaanfii seeraa akka fudhatamu gaafachaa jiru.

title: Watch: Hamas elects Khalil al-Hayya as head of its political bureau
english: Hamas has chosen Khalil al-Hayya to lead its political bureau, marking a significant leadership change for the organization. As a seasoned negotiator, al-Hayya will now take a central role in guiding the group during the ongoing conflict in Gaza. This appointment comes at a critical time as the movement continues to deal with the impacts of the war with Israel.
amharic: ሀማስ ካሊል አል-ሃያን የፖለቲካ ቢሮው አዲሱ መሪ አድርጎ መርጧል። ልምድ ያለው ድርድር አድራጊ በመሆኑ፣ አል-ሃያ በጋዛ እየተካሄደ ባለው ጦርነት ወቅት የቡድኑን አመራር የመምራት ዋና ኃላፊነት ይረከባል። ይህሹመት ቡድኑ ከእስራኤል ጋር ባለው ውጥረት በተሞላበት ወቅት የተደረገ ወሳኝ የለውጥ እርምጃ ነው።
oromo: Hamaas Khaalil al-Hayyaan hogganaa biiroo siyaasaa isaa haaraa godhee filateera. Inni nama muuxannoo fi ga'umsa marii guddaa qabu waan ta'eef, yeroo ammaa Gaza keessatti waraanni jiru keessatti hogganummaa guddaa fudhata. Muudamni kun yeroo iddoo gudda qabu kan raawwatame yoo ta'u, kunis sochii gareen kun Israa'el waliin qabu irratti jijjiirama guddaa fiduu danda'a.

title: UN concerned about Houthi Red Sea naval blockade threats
english: The United Nations has expressed deep concern regarding Houthi threats to block maritime routes near Saudi Arabia. Officials warn that such an embargo could severely disrupt global fuel supplies and cause oil prices to spike. This instability poses a significant risk to the worldwide economy, similar to existing challenges faced in the Strait of Hormuz.
amharic: የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት ሁቲዎች በሳዑዲ አረቢያ አቅራቢያ የሚገኙ የባህር መስመሮችን ለመዝጋት የገቡትን ዛቻ በተመለከተ ስጋቱን ገልጿል። እንዲህ ዓይነቱ እገዳ የአለም አቀፍ የነዳጅ አቅርቦትን በእጅጉ ሊያስተጓጉል እና የነዳጅ ዋጋ እንዲጨምር ሊያደርግ እንደሚችል ተነግሯል። ይህ ሁኔታ እንደ ሆርሙዝ ባህር ሰላጤ ሁሉ በአለም ኢኮኖሚ ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ ሊፈጥር እንደሚችልም ተገልጿል።
oromo: Dhaabbanni Mootummoota Gamtoomanii gareen Huthis karaa bishaan irraa kan Saudii Arabiyaa biratti argamu cufuuf yaada qaban irratti yaaddoo guddaa qaba. Hoggantoonni akka ibsanitti, dhorkaan akkasii dhiyeessii boba'aa addunyaa gufachiisuu fi gatii boba'aa akka ol ka'u taasisuu danda'a. Rakkoon kun akka kan Hormuzitti, diinagdee addunyaa irratti miidhaa guddaa qaqqabsiisuu akka danda'u yaadachiisaniiru.

title: Reports of more explosions in Iran's Bandar Abbas
english: Additional explosions have been reported in the southern Iranian city of Bandar Abbas. These incidents occurred on Monday during a period of ongoing military strikes conducted by the United States against Iran. State-run news sources have confirmed the reports as tensions remain high in the region.
amharic: በኢራን ደቡባዊ ከተማ ባንዳር አባስ ተጨማሪ ፍንዳታዎች መከሰታቸው ተዘግቧል። እነዚህ ፍንዳታዎች የተከሰቱት ሰኞ ዕለት አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ በወሰደችው ተከታታይ ወታደራዊ ጥቃት ወቅት ነው። የመንግስት የዜና ምንጮች በክልሉ ውጥረቱ ከፍተኛ መሆኑን በመጥቀስ ጉዳዩን አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Magaalaa kibba Iran, Bandar Abbas keessatti dhohiinsa dabalataa akka uumame gabaafameera. Dhohiinsichi kan uumame yeroo Ameerikaan Iran irratti haleellaa waraanaa geggeessituu ture. Maddi oduu mootummaa akka ibsetti, naannichatti waraansi cimaan itti fufee jiraachuu beeksiseera.

title: Iranian army says it targeted US missile systems at Kuwaiti base
english: The Iranian military announced it launched ground-to-ground missiles at a U.S. base in Kuwait called Camp Arifjan. This action was described as a retaliatory strike following previous U.S. military operations against Iran. The attack was identified by Iranian officials as part of their ongoing series of military maneuvers known as the Thunder operation.
amharic: የኢራን ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኩዌት በሚገኘው የአሜሪካ ካምፕ አሪፍጃን ወታደራዊ ጣቢያ ላይ ሚሳኤል ማጥቃቱን አስታውቋል። ይህ ድርጊት አሜሪካ በኢራን ላይ ለፈጸመችው ጥቃት አጸፋዊ ምላሽ እንደሆነ ተገልጿል። ጥቃቱም ኢራን እያካሄደች ካለችው የነጎድጓድ ወታደራዊ ኦፕሬሽን አካል መሆኑ ተጠቅሷል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyyaa Iraan buufata waraana Ameerikaa Kuweyt keessatti argamu, Kaamp Arifjaani jedhamu irratti misaa'ela dhukaasuusaa beeksise. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame erga Ameerikaan Iraan irratti haleellaa raawwattee booda akka haaloo ba'iinsatti ta'u ibsameera. Haleellaan kunis hojii waraanaa Iraan 'Thunder' ykn 'Bakakkaa' jedhamuun beekamu keessaa kutaa tokko akka ta'e himameera.

title: Second explosion reported in Iran’s Bandar Lengeh
english: A second explosion has been reported in the Iranian port city of Bandar Lengeh. The incident occurred in the Hormozgan province along the Persian Gulf. Local news agencies have confirmed the sound of the blast, though details regarding the cause or potential damage remain limited.
amharic: በኢራን የባህር ዳርቻ ከተማ በሆነችው ባንደር ሌንጌህ ሁለተኛ ፍንዳታ መከሰቱ ተዘግቧል። ይህ ድርጊት የተፈፀመው በፋርስ ባሕረ ሰላጤ አቅራቢያ በሚገኘው የሆርሞዝጋን ግዛት ነው። የሀገር ውስጥ የዜና አውታሮች የፍንዳታው ድምፅ መሰማቱን ያረጋገጡ ሲሆን ስለ ጉዳቱ ወይም ስለ ፍንዳታው መንስኤ እስካሁን የታወቀ ነገር የለም።
oromo: Magaalaa portii Iran, Bandar Lengeh keessatti dhohiinsi lammaffaan tokko dhaga’ameera. Dhohiinsi kun kan mudate naannoo Hormozgan kan galaana Pershiyaa cinaatti argamu keessatti dha. Oduun naannichaa sagalee dhohiichaa mirkaneessee jiraatus, sababaa fi miidhaa dhohiichaan ga’e ilaalchisee odeeffannoon bal’aan hin jiru.

title: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian imports
english: President Trump has issued an executive order to place a 50% tariff on a variety of Canadian imports starting August 19. This action serves as retaliation for perceived unfair trade practices concerning American dairy, alcohol, and automotive products. While many consumer and industrial goods are affected, essential items like energy and critical minerals remain exempt from the new tax.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ከነሐሴ 19 ጀምሮ በካናዳ ምርቶች ላይ የ50 በመቶ የጉምሩክ ቀረጥ እንዲጣል ትዕዛዝ አስተላልፈዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው አሜሪካ በካናዳ የወተት፣ የአልኮል እና የመኪና ምርቶች ላይ ፍትሃዊ ያልሆነ አያያዝ እየተፈጸመባት ነው በሚል ነው። ምንም እንኳን የተለያዩ የፍጆታ እና የኢንዱስትሪ ምርቶች በዚህ ውሳኔ ቢነኩም፣ እንደ ነዳጅ እና ማዕድናት ያሉ ወሳኝ ምርቶች ግን ከቀረጡ ነጻ ተደርገዋል።
oromo: Pirezidaanti Traamp Hagayya 19 irraa eegalee meeshaalee biyya Kanaadaa irraa gara Ameerikaatti galan hunda irratti gibira dhibbeentaa 50 akka kaffalan ajaja kennaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame, Kanaadaan oomishaalee aannan, alkoolii fi konkolaataa Ameerikaa irratti qabuun walqixxee ta'e hin goone jechuun mormuufi. Meeshaaleen hedduun gibira kana keessatti kan hammataman ta'us, meeshaaleen barbaachisoo akka anniisaa fi albuudonni gibira irraa bilisa ta'aniiru.

title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
english: The United States military has launched a new wave of strikes against Iranian targets to weaken their ability to disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. These operations follow President Trump's pledge to retaliate for the recent deaths of American soldiers in Jordan and Iraq. Meanwhile, Iran has characterized the ongoing conflict as a full-scale war, with regional nations reporting missile and drone interceptions as tensions escalate significantly.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በሆርሙዝ የባህር በር የሚደረገውን የንግድ መርከቦች እንቅስቃሴ ለማስጠበቅ ኢራን ላይ አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። እነዚህ ጥቃቶች የተፈጸሙት በዮርዳኖስ እና በኢራቅ ለተገደሉ የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች አጸፋ ለመስጠት ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ከገቡት ቃል በኋላ ነው። በሌላ በኩል ኢራን ግጭቱን እንደ ሙሉ ጦርነት የገለጸች ሲሆን በአካባቢው ያሉ ሀገራትም የኢራን ድሮኖች እና ሚሳኤሎችን እየተከላከሉ እንደሚገኙ ዘግበዋል።
oromo: Humnooti waraana Amerikaa, dooniilee galaana Hormuz keessa socho'an irratti dhiibbaa irra gahaa jiru hir'isuuf jecha lafa Iiraan irratti haleellaa haaraa bananiiru. Haleellaan kun kan raawwatame, du'a loltoota Amerikaa Yordaanos fi Iraaq keessatti mudateef deebii kennuuf jecha pireezidaant Tiraamp waadaa seenan hordofee dha. Gamtaan Iiraan waraana kana akka waraana guutuu ta'eetti ibsitee jirti; biyyoonni naannichaa ammoo meeshaalee waraanaa Iiraan irraa dhufan akka ittisaa jiran gabaasameera.

title: World Cup champions Spain return to royal welcome, parade through Madrid
english: The Spanish national football team returned home to a massive celebration in Madrid after winning their second World Cup title against Argentina. Nearly two million fans lined the streets to cheer on the squad as they paraded on an open-top bus toward Cibeles Square. Before the public festivities, the players and coaching staff were honored by the country's royal family and Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez.
amharic: የስፔን ብሔራዊ እግር ኳስ ቡድን አርጀንቲናን በማሸነፍ ሁለተኛ የዓለም ዋንጫ ክብራቸውን ካገኙ በኋላ ወደ ማድሪድ በመመለስ ደማቅ አቀባበል ተደረገላቸው። ወደ ሲቤለስ አደባባይ በተጓዙበት ወቅት ወደ ሁለት ሚሊዮን የሚጠጉ ደጋፊዎች በየጎዳናው በመውጣት ቡድኑን በደስታ አጅበዋል። ከሕዝባዊ ክብረ በዓሉ በፊት፣ የተጫዋቾች ቡድን እና አሰልጣኞች በስፔን ንጉሣዊ ቤተሰብ እና በጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ፔድሮ ሳንቼዝ አቀባበል ተደርጎላቸዋል።
oromo: gareen kubbaa miilaa biyyoolessa Ispeen, Arjantiinaa injifachuun waancaa addunyaa isa lammaffaa erga mo'atanii booda gara Maadriditti deebi'anii simannaa ho'aa argataniiru. Gareen kun gara iddoo Cibeles Square imaluu isaanii, deggertoonni miliyoona lama ta'an daandiiwwan irra dhaabatanii gammachuu isaanii ibsaniiru. Ayyaana uummataa kana dura, taphattoonniifi leenjistoonni garee kanaa maatii mootummaafi muummicha ministeeraa Pedro Sanchez biratti simatamaniiru.

title: Albanian protesters pelt lawmakers’ cars over resort projects
english: Demonstrators in Albania recently targeted the vehicles of government officials with eggs outside the parliament building. The protesters are voicing their strong opposition to new legislation that permits the construction of tourist resorts within designated protected natural zones. They are calling for an immediate revision of these laws to prioritize environmental preservation.
amharic: በአልባኒያ የተቃውሞ ሰልፍ ያደረጉ ሰዎች በፓርላማ ህንጻ ውጭ በመገኘት የመንግስት ባለስልጣናትን መኪናዎች በዕንቁላል ወግተዋል። ተቃዋሚዎቹ በታወቁ የተፈጥሮ ጥበቃ ቦታዎች ላይ የቱሪስት መዝናኛ ማዕከላትን ለመገንባት የሚያስችለውን አዲስ ህግ እየተቃወሙ ነው። እነዚህ ህጎች አካባቢን ለመጠበቅ እንዲሻሻሉ ሰልፈኞቹ ጠይቀዋል።
oromo: Hiriirtonni Albeeniyaa keessatti mormii dhageessisaa turan konkolaattota miseensota paarlaamaa irratti hanqaaquu darbachuun mormii isaanii ibsataniiru. Hiriirtonni kun seera haaraa bakkeewwan eegumsa qaban keessatti ijaarsa iddoowwan boqonnaa tuuristii heyyamu mormaa jiru. Akkaataa seera kanaa jijjiiruun naannoo eeguun akka dursamu gaafataniiru.

title: FIFA investigating on-pitch brawl after Spain vs Argentina World Cup final
english: FIFA has launched an official investigation into a violent brawl that broke out between Spanish and Argentinian players following the 2026 World Cup final. The physical altercation occurred immediately after Spain secured a 1-0 victory, involving several players such as Leandro Paredes who were caught on camera shoving opponents. FIFA is now reviewing match reports to determine appropriate disciplinary actions for those involved in the post-match incident.
amharic: የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ መጠናቀቁን ተከትሎ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና ተጫዋቾች መካከል በተፈጠረ ግጭት ፊፋ ምርመራ መጀመሩን አስታውቋል። ስፔን 1 ለ 0 አሸንፋ ዋንጫውን ባነሳችበት በዚህ ጨዋታ ማገባደጃ ላይ የተጫዋቾች አካላዊ ግጭት ተከስቷል። ፊፋ የጨዋታውን ሪፖርቶች በመመርመር በግጭቱ ውስጥ ተሳትፎ ባላቸው ተጫዋቾች ላይ ተገቢውን የዲሲፕሊን እርምጃ ለመውሰድ ዝግጅት እያደረገ ይገኛል።
oromo: FIFA tapha xumuraa waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 booda taphattoota Ispeenii fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti walitti bu’iinsi uumame irratti qorannoo eegaleera. Ispeen 1-0 injifattee waancicha erga mohattee booda, taphattoonni akka Leandro Paredes jiran wal dhiibuu fi walitti bu’uu isaanitiin walitti bu’iinsichi uumame. FIFA gabaasa taphichaa erga qoratee booda, namoota badii raawwatan irratti tarkaanfii seeraa fudhachuuf akka qophaa’aa jiru beeksiseera.

title: Trump rejects Mamdani threat to arrest Israel’s Netanyahu for war crimes
english: US President Donald Trump has publicly rejected New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's suggestion that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu could be arrested for war crimes during a future visit to the city. While Mayor Mamdani cited an active International Criminal Court warrant as the basis for a potential arrest, President Trump guaranteed that no such action would be permitted. Israel has dismissed the mayor's threats, labeling the ICC's authority as illegitimate.
amharic: የአሜሪካው ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ የኒውዮርክ ከንቲባ ዞራን ማምዳኒ የእስራኤሉ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ ከተማዋን ሲጎበኙ በጦር ወንጀል ሊታሰሩ ይችላሉ የሚለውን ሃሳብ በይፋ ውድቅ አድርገዋል። ከንቲባው በዓለም አቀፉ የወንጀለኞች ፍርድ ቤት የተሰጠውን የእስር ማዘዣ መሰረት በማድረግ ይህንን ሃሳብ ቢያነሱም፣ ፕሬዝዳንቱ ግን ኔታንያሁ በየትኛውም ሁኔታ እንደማይታሰሩ ቃል ገብተዋል። እስራኤል የከንቲባውን ማስፈራሪያ ውድቅ በማድረግ፣ የፍርድ ቤቱን ስልጣን እንደማትቀበል ገልጻለች።
oromo: Pirezedaantiin Yuunaayitid Isteets Doolnaald Traamp, kantiibaan magaalaa Niwuu Yoork Zooraan Maamdaanii, muummeen ministiraa Israa'el Benjaamin Netanyaahuu yeroo gara magaalaa sanaa dhufanitti yakka waraanaatiin qabamuu danda'u jechuun dubbatan hin fudhatamu jedhaniiru. Kantiibaan sun manni murtii yakka waraanaa idil-addunyaa ajaja qabuu baasuun isaa akka sababaatti kan kaasan ta'us, pirezedaant Traamp Netanyaahuun akka hin qabamne mirkaneessaniiru. Israa'el yaada kantiibichaa kana balaaleffachuun, aangoo manni murtii idil-addunyaa qabu kan hin fudhanne ta'uu ibsiteetti.

title: King of Spain celebrates World Cup winners in Madrid
english: King Felipe VI of Spain hosted the national women's football team at his palace in Madrid to honor their recent World Cup victory against Argentina. The players were welcomed by the monarch before participating in a celebratory parade through the city. This event marked a special recognition of the team's historic achievement in the tournament.
amharic: የስፔኑ ንጉሥ ፊሊፕ ስድስተኛ የአርጀንቲናን ቡድን በማሸነፍ የዓለም ዋንጫን ያነሱትን የስፔን ሴቶች ብሔራዊ ቡድን አባላት በማድሪድ በሚገኘው ቤተ መንግስታቸው ተቀብለው አክብረዋቸዋል። ተጫዋቾቹ በከተማው ውስጥ ከመካሄዱ በፊት በንጉሱ አቀባበል ተደርጎላቸዋል። ይህ ስነ-ስርዓት ለቡድኑ ታሪካዊ ድል የተሰጠ ክብርን የሚገልጽ ነው።
oromo: mootichi Ispeen Filiipii ja'affaan, gareen kubbaa miilaa dubartoota Ispeen guddicha, tapha waancaa addunyaa irratti Arjentiinaa mo'atanii deebi'an, mana mootummaa Maadriditti simatanii kabajaniiru. Taphattoonni kun magaalattii keessatti ayyaana kabaja injifannoo irratti hirmaachuun dura mooticha biratti simannaa argataniiru. Ayyaanni kun injifannoo seena qabeessa gareen kun galmeessiseef kabaja kennamee dha.

title: Tate brothers appear in US court for extradition proceedings
english: Influencer Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan appeared in a Florida court to begin extradition proceedings to the UK. The brothers face 38 new charges, including rape and sex trafficking, which they and their legal team strongly deny. Their lawyer plans to fight the extradition, which he claims is politically motivated, with the next court date scheduled for July.
amharic: ታዋቂው ኢንፍሉዌንሰር አንድሪው ታይት እና ወንድሙ ትሪስታን ወደ እንግሊዝ እንዲዛወሩ የተጠየቀውን የፍርድ ሂደት ለመጀመር በፍሎሪዳ ፍርድ ቤት ቀርበዋል። ወንድማማቾቹ በግድ ወሲባዊ ግንኙነት እና በሰዎች የንግድ ዝውውር ወንጀል የተከሰሱ ሲሆን፣ እነርሱና ጠበቃቸው ክሱ ፈጽሞ ስህተት እንደሆነ በመግለጽ ይከራከራሉ። ጠበቃቸው ክሱ ፖለቲካዊ ተጽዕኖ ያለበት መሆኑን በመጥቀስ የኤክስትራዲሽን ሂደቱን እንደሚቃወሙ ገልጸዋል፤ ቀጣዩ የፍርድ ቤት ቀጠሮም ለሐምሌ ወር ተይዟል።
oromo: Influensarri Andrew Tate fi obboleessi isaa Tristan gara biyya Ingilizitti akka dabarfaman taasisuuf adeemsa seeraa jalqabuuf mana murtee Floridaatti dhiyaataniiru. Obbolaan kun himannaa saalaan wal-qunnamtii dirqisiisuu fi namoota seeraan ala gurguruu dabalatee himannaa haaraa 38 irratti banameef kan morman yoo ta'u, abukaatoon isaanii himannaan kun kan biyya lafaa fi siyaasaa irratti xiyyeeffate jedhaniiru. Abukaatoon isaanii adeemsa gara Ingilizitti dabarfamuu kana kan morman yoo ta'u, beellamni mana murtee isaanii itti aanu ji'a Adoolessaatti qabameera.

title: Gaza residents weigh in on election of new Hamas leader
english: Hamas has appointed Khalil al-Hayya as its new leader, sparking diverse opinions among the people living in Gaza. While some residents view this leadership transition as a major political development, others are skeptical about whether it will improve the dire humanitarian situation. Many are waiting to see if this change in command will influence the ongoing conflict or provide relief for civilians.
amharic: ሃማስ ካሊል አል-ሃያን አዲሱ መሪ አድርጎ መሾሙ በጋዛ ነዋሪዎች ዘንድ የተለያየ ምላሽ ፈጥሯል። አንዳንዶች ይህ የሥልጣን ሽግግር ትልቅ የፖለቲካ ፋይዳ እንዳለው ሲያምኑ፣ ሌሎች ግን ለውጡ በጋዛ ያለውን የከፋ የሰብዓዊ ቀውስ ለመቅረፍ እንደሚረዳ ጥርጣሬ አላቸው። ነዋሪዎቹ ይህ የአመራር ለውጥ በጦርነቱ ላይ ወይም በሲቪሎች ዕለት ተዕለት ሕይወት ላይ ምን ለውጥ እንደሚያመጣ በጉጉት እየጠበቁ ናቸው።
oromo: Hamaas hogganaa haaraa isaa godhatee Khalil al-Hayya filachuun isaa jiraattota Gaaza biratti yaada gara garaa uumeera. Namoonni tokko tokko jijjiiramni kun dhimma siyaasaa guddaa ta'uu isaa yoo ibsan, biroon garuu hogganaan kun rakkoo namoomaa naannichatti hammaate furuu danda'a jedhanii shakku. Jiraattonni jijjiiramni kun waraana ykn jireenya siviilotaa irratti dhiibbaa qabaachuu isaa baruuf eegaa jiru.

title: How will Zelenskyy handle the growing political crisis at home?
english: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is currently managing a dual challenge as Ukraine faces intensifying Russian missile strikes while dealing with domestic political instability. The dismissal of a defense minister has triggered public protests and raised concerns about potential leadership rifts within the government. These internal tensions are causing anxiety, as experts fear such divisions could weaken Ukraine's position and potentially benefit Russia during the ongoing conflict.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ቮሎዲሚር ዘለንስኪ በዩክሬን እየተባባሰ በመጣው የሩሲያ የሮኬት ጥቃት እና በውስጣዊ የፖለቲካ ቀውስ መካከል ይገኛሉ። የመከላከያ ሚኒስትር ከሥራ መባረር ተከትሎ በተነሳው ህዝባዊ ተቃውሞ በመንግስት ከፍተኛ አመራሮች መካከል ክፍፍል መኖሩን ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ይህ የውስጥ አለመረጋጋት በጦርነቱ ላይ ተጽእኖ በመፍጠር ለሩሲያ የላቀ ዕድል ሊሰጥ እንደሚችል ባለሙያዎች ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Pirezidaant Volodimir Zeelenski waraana biyyattii irratti Rashiyaan haleellaa rookeettii cimaa geggeessaa jirtuu fi rakkoo siyaasaa keessa biyyaatti mudateen wal qabatee qormaata cimaa keessa jiru. Ministirri ittisaa hojii irraa buufamuun isaa mormii uummataa kakaaseera akkasumas gidduu geggeessitoota mootummaa keessatti wal dhabdeen jiraachuu isaa shakkisiiseera. Haalli kun nageenya biyyattii miidhee fi karaa biraa immoo Rashiyaaf carraa gaarii ta'uu danda'a jedhamee sodaatamaa jira.

title: Ortega insists no more elections for Nicaragua
english: Nicaraguan President Daniel Ortega has officially declared an end to elections in his country, stating that he will no longer allow political opposition groups to challenge his rule. He claims this decision is necessary to prevent influence from the United States and to solidify his control after years of cracking down on political rivals. International organizations and human rights groups have long criticized Ortega’s administration for suppressing dissent, detaining opponents, and dismantling democratic institutions.
amharic: የኒካራጓው ፕሬዚዳንት ዳንኤል ኦርቴጋ በሀገሪቱ ከአሁን በኋላ ምርጫ እንደማይኖር በይፋ አስታውቀዋል። ኦርቴጋ ይህንን ውሳኔ የወሰኑት የተቃዋሚ ፓርቲዎች በምርጫ ስም ስልጣንን እንዳይቀሙ ለመከላከል በሚል ምክንያት ነው። ዓለም አቀፍ ተቋማት እና የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋቾች መንግስታቸው ተቃዋሚዎችን በማሰር እና የዴሞክራሲ ስርአቱን በማፈን ለረጅም ጊዜ ስልጣን ላይ ለመቆየት እየሰራ ነው ሲሉ በሰፊው ይተቻሉ።
oromo: Pirezedantiin Nikaraaguwaa Daani’eel Orteegaa biyyattii keessatti kanaan booda filannoon akka hin geggeeffamne ifa godhaniiru. Orteegaa murtee kana kan dabarsan, gareewwan mormituu biyyattii aangoo akka hin fudhanneef jechuun ta’uu isaa ibsaniiru. Dhaabbileen idil-addunyaa fi mirga namoomaa falman, mootummaan isaa mormitoota hidhuu fi sirna dimookiraasii ukkaamsuun aangoo qabachuuf yaaluu isaa cimsanii balaaleffachaa jiru.

title: Man arrested after fire outside New York immigration court
english: A man was taken into custody in New York City after using an incendiary device to start a fire outside an immigration court building. The targeted facility serves as a workspace for several federal agencies, such as the FBI and ICE. Authorities are currently investigating the incident.
amharic: ኒው ዮርክ ከተማ በሚገኝ የኢሚግሬሽን ፍርድ ቤት ህንጻ ውጭ እሳት የለኮሰ አንድ ሰው በቁጥጥር ስር ውሏል። ይህ ህንጻ የኤፍቢአይን (FBI) እና የኢሚግሬሽን እና የጉምሩክ ማስፈጸሚያ (ICE) ጨምሮ በርካታ የፌደራል ተቋማት የሚገኙበት ቦታ ነው። ባለስልጣናት በጉዳዩ ላይ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Magala New Yorkitti namni tokko mana murtiin godaantotaa itti argamu irratti ibiddaan miidhaa geessiseef to'annoo jala ooleera. Mana hojii kana keessa dhaabbileen federaalaa akka FBI fi ICE fayyadamoo dha. Abbootiin taayitaa dhimma kana irratti qorannoo gaggeessaa jiru.

title: Monsoon-driven flash flooding kills at least 20 in Afghanistan
english: Severe monsoon-triggered flash floods have struck Afghanistan's Nuristan province, resulting in at least 20 deaths and over 80 injuries. The disaster destroyed numerous homes, shops, and municipal infrastructure in the city of Parun, leaving several local officials missing. Emergency response teams are currently conducting search and rescue operations to locate survivors amidst the widespread destruction.
amharic: በአፍጋኒስታን ኑሪስታን ግዛት በደረሰ ኃይለኛ የጎርፍ አደጋ ቢያንስ 20 ሰዎች ሕይወታቸው አልፏል ከ80 በላይ የሚሆኑት ደግሞ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። የፓሩን ከተማን ያጥለቀለቀው የጎርፍ መጥለቅለቅ መኖሪያ ቤቶችን፣ ሱቆችን እና የመንግስት መሥሪያ ቤቶችን በማውደም ለከፍተኛ ውድመት ዳርጓል። በአሁኑ ወቅት የአደጋ ጊዜ ሠራተኞች የጠፉ ሰዎችን ለማግኘት እና የነፍስ አድን ሥራዎችን ለማከናወን ጥረት እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: ጅጅጅጋራan roobni cimaan godina Nuuristaan kan Afganistaan keessatti hammaatee bishaan lolaa namoota 20 ol ajjeeseera, namoonni 80 ol immoo miidhaniiru. Lolaan kun magaalaa Paarun keessatti manneen, suuqotaa fi gamoo mootummaa barbadeesseera, akkasumas hoggantoonni magaalaa muraasni badaniiru. Yeroo ammaa kanatti gareen gargaarsaa namoota badanii jiran barbaaduufi miidhamtoota gargaaruuf hojjechaa jiru.

title: Multiple explosions heard in Iran's Chabahar and Konarak
english: Local media outlets in Iran have reported that a series of explosions occurred in the southern coastal cities of Chabahar and Konarak. Authorities are currently monitoring the situation in the region. Further details regarding the cause or potential damage from these blasts have not yet been disclosed.
amharic: በኢራን የሚገኙ የዜና አውታሮች በደቡባዊቷ የኢራን ከተሞች በቻባሃር እና በኮናራክ በርካታ ፍንዳታዎች መከሰታቸውን ዘግበዋል። ባለሥልጣናት በአካባቢው ያለውን ሁኔታ በቅርበት እየተከታተሉ ይገኛሉ። ስለ ፍንዳታዎቹ መንስኤ ወይም ስለደረሰው ጉዳት እስካሁን የተገለጸ ነገር የለም።
oromo: Miidiyaaleen biyya Iraan akka gabaasanitti, magaalonni kibba Iraan kan ta'an Chaabahaar fi Konaaraak keessatti dhuka'oonni hedduun dhaga'amaniiru. Aangeyyoonni haala naannichaa hordofaa jiru. Sababa dhuka'ichaa ykn miidhaa ga'e ilaalchisee odeeffannoon dabalataa hanga ammaatti ifa hin baane.

title: Reports of explosions on Iran's Qeshm Island
english: Local media outlets in Iran have reported that multiple explosions occurred on Qeshm Island this past Monday. Details regarding the exact cause or impact of these incidents remain limited at this stage. Official sources have yet to provide further context on the situation.
amharic: የኢራን የዜና ወኪል በሰኞ ዕለት በቄሽም ደሴት ላይ ተከታታይ ፍንዳታዎች መከሰታቸውን ዘግቧል። ስለ ፍንዳታዎቹ መንስኤ ወይም ጉዳት እስካሁን የተገለጸ ዝርዝር መረጃ የለም። ባለስልጣናት በጉዳዩ ላይ ተጨማሪ ማብራሪያ አልሰጡም።
oromo: Gabaasni miidiyaa Iraan akka ibsetti, guyyaa Wiixata darbe qe'ee Qeshm irratti dhukaatiin hedduun dhaga'ameera. Sababaa fi miidhaa dhukaatiin kun geessise ilaalchisee hanga ammaatti odeeffannoon bal'aan hin kennamne. Aangawaan mootummaa waa'ee dhimma kanaa irratti ibsa dabalataa hin kennine.

title: Israeli forces detain five Palestinians, including two children, in occupied West Bank
english: Israeli military forces conducted a raid on the village of Kisan near Bethlehem on Monday evening. During the operation, soldiers searched multiple homes and arrested five Palestinian residents. Among those taken into custody were two minors, ages 15 and 16.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደሮች ሰኞ አመሻሽ ላይ በቤተልሔም አቅራቢያ በምትገኘው ኪሳን መንደር ወረራ አካሄዱ። በኦፕሬሽኑ ወቅት ወታደሮቹ በርካታ ቤቶችን ከመረመሩ በኋላ አምስት ፍልስጤማውያንን በቁጥጥር ስር አውለዋል። ከተያዙት መካከል ዕድሜያቸው 15 እና 16 የሆኑ ሁለት ህጻናት ይገኙበታል።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Israa'el Dilbata galgala ganda Betlehemitti dhihoo jirtu kan taate Kisaan keessatti duula gaggeessaniiru. Duula kanaan mana jireenyaa hedduu sakatta'uun, lammiilee Falasxiin shan to'annaa jala oolchaniiru. Namoota to'ataman keessaa ijoolleen umurii 15 fi 16 ta'an lama argamu.

title: Saudi-led coalition in Yemen says it will respond to Houthi's threats to ships with force
english: The Saudi-led coalition has vowed to use military force in response to Houthi threats against shipping lanes. This decision follows the Houthis' attempt to block naval traffic, which the coalition firmly denies. Consequently, Saudi authorities are now putting new security protocols in place to protect vessels navigating the Bab el-Mandeb Strait.
amharic: በሳዑዲ አረቢያ የሚመራው ጥምረት በሁቲ አማጽያን የመርከብ ጉዞ ላይ ለሚቃጡ ስጋቶች በወታደራዊ ኃይል እንደሚመልስ አስታውቋል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተወሰደው ሁቲዎች የባህር ላይ እገዳ መጣላቸውን ተከትሎ ሲሆን ጥምረቱ ክሱ መሰረተ ቢስ መሆኑን ገልጿል። ሳዑዲ አረቢያ በባብ ኤል-ማንዴብ የባህር ጠረፍ የሚያልፉ መርከቦችን ደህንነት ለመጠበቅ አዳዲስ የጥበቃ እርምጃዎችን መጀመሯን አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Mootummoonni Saudii durfamtuun gama isaanitiin, gareen Huutii dooniiwwan irratti balaa agarsiisuu isaa dura dhaabbachuuf humna waraanaa akka fayyadaman ibsaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe erga gareen Huutii daandii galaanaa ugguruuf yaalii godhee booda yoo ta'u, gama isaaniitiin Saudiin himannaa kana guutummaatti haaltu. Kanaafis, mootummoonni kunneen dooniiwwan daandii Bab el-Mandeb keessa darban eeguuf tattaaffii nageenyaa cimsuuf murteessaniiru.

title: US Centcom says it has launched new round of strikes on Iran
english: The United States military has initiated a fresh series of strikes against Iran following orders from the President. These operations aim to weaken Iranian military assets that have been threatening cargo ships traveling through the Strait of Hormuz. The mission is part of an ongoing effort to improve safety for commercial maritime traffic in the region.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በፕሬዝዳንቱ ትዕዛዝ በአይራን ላይ አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። ይህ እርምጃ በሆርሙዝ የባህር መተላለፊያ ላይ የንግድ መርከቦችን ሲያጠቁ የነበሩ የአይራን ወታደራዊ አቅሞችን ለማዳከም ያለመ ነው። ጥቃቱ በክልሉ የሚደረገውን የንግድ መርከቦች እንቅስቃሴ ደህንነት ለማስጠበቅ የታሰበ ነው።
oromo: Waraanni Amerikaa ajaja pirezidaantii biyyattii hordofuun Iranirratti haleellaa haarawaa geggeessuu isaa beeksiseera. Haleellaan kun kan xiyyeeffate meeshaalee waraanaa Iran kanneen daandii galaana Hormuz keessa maashinoota daldalaa miidhuuf fayyadan dadhabsiisuufi. Tarkaanfiin kun nageenya dooniiwwan daldalaa naannichatti socho'anii eeguuf kan taasifameedha.

title: Yemeni women support families through enterprise as economic crisis bites
english: In Yemen, a severe economic crisis and the ongoing civil war have made it difficult for families to survive on a single income. To address this, many women are breaking traditional gender roles by working alongside their husbands to run small businesses. A successful example is a couple in Taiz who operate a fast-food restaurant together, showing how shared effort and partnership help them navigate extreme financial hardship.
amharic: በየመን ያለው ከባድ የኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና የእርስ በርስ ጦርነት ቤተሰቦች በአንድ የገቢ ምንጭ እንዲተዳደሩ አዳጋች አድርጎባቸዋል። ለዚህ ችግር መፍትሄ ለመስጠት፣ ብዙ ሴቶች ባህላዊ አመለካከቶችን በመስበር ከባሎቻቸው ጎን በመቆም የራሳቸውን አነስተኛ ንግድ በመምራት ላይ ይገኛሉ። በታኢዝ ከተማ የሚኖሩ አንድ ጥንዶች ፈጣን የምግብ ቤት ስራን በጋራ በማከናወን፣ የጋራ ጥረት ለቤተሰብ ኢኮኖሚያዊ ችግር መፍትሄ እንደሚሆን በተግባር እያሳዩ ነው።
oromo: Yemen keessatti rakkoon dinagdee cimaafi waraansi biyya keessaa maatiin galii tokkoon akka jiraatan baay'ee ulfaataa taasiseera. Rakkoo kana furuuf, dubartoonni baay'een aadaa durii cabsuun abbootii manaa isaanii waliin ta'uun hojii daldalaa xixinnoo gaggeessaa jiru. Fakkeenyaaf, magaalatti Taiz keessatti kan argaman abbaa manaa fi haadha manaa lamaan tokko ta'uun mana nyaataa saffisaa gaggeessaa jiran kun, waliin hojjechuun rakkina dinagdee keessatti jijjiirama akka fidu kan mul'isu dha.

title: EU pauses methane penalties amid energy crisis, US pressure
english: The European Union has suggested pausing financial penalties for oil and gas companies that fail to meet methane emission standards between 2027 and 2030. This decision follows significant pressure from the United States and other energy-exporting nations worried about supply disruptions amid the ongoing Middle East conflict. While the regulation remains in place, officials believe this temporary relief is necessary to maintain stable energy supplies during the current global crisis.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት ከ2027 እስከ 2030 ባለው ጊዜ ውስጥ የሚቴን ልቀት መስፈርቶችን የማያሟሉ የነዳጅ እና ጋዝ ኩባንያዎች ላይ የሚጣል የገንዘብ ቅጣት እንዲቆይ ሐሳብ አቅርቧል። ይህ ውሳኔ የተወሰደው በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ ግጭት ሳቢያ ሊከሰት የሚችለውን የኃይል አቅርቦት መስተጓጎል በመስጋት በአሜሪካ እና በሌሎች አገራት በተደረገ ጫና ነው። ደንቡ አሁንም በሥራ ላይ ቢሆንም፣ ባለስልጣናት በአሁኑ የዓለም አቀፍ የኃይል ቀውስ ወቅት አቅርቦትን ለማረጋጋት ይህ ጊዜያዊ እፎይታ አስፈላጊ እንደሆነ ያምናሉ።
oromo: Gamtaan Awurooppaa, kampanonni boba'aa fi gaazii seera gadi-lakkisa gaazii meeteenii (methane) hin guunne adabbii maallaqaa irraa hanga bara 2030tti akka bilisa ta'an yaada dhiyeesseera. Murtoon kun kan dhufe dhiibbaa Ameerikaa fi biyyoota biroo waraana giddu gala bahaa irraa kan ka'e dhiyeessii anniisaa irratti dhiibbaan akka hin uumamneef yaadamee dha. Seerichi akka jiru ta'us, qondaalonni akka jedhanitti, yeroo ammaa kana rakkoo anniisaa addunyaa mudate kana keessatti dhiyeessii tasgabbii qabuuf jecha tarkaanfiin kun barbaachisaa dha.

title: US judge orders pause on Paramount–Warner Bros merger
english: A US judge has temporarily halted the planned merger between Paramount and Warner Bros following a lawsuit filed by 12 states concerned about reduced competition and potential job losses. The court has given these states two weeks to present their formal arguments, with a hearing scheduled for August. This delay puts Paramount at risk of significant financial penalties, as the company faces high quarterly fees if the agreement is not finalized by late September.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ዳኛ በፓራማውንት እና በዋርነር ብሮስ መካከል ሊደረግ የነበረው ውህደት፣ ውድድርን ይቀንሳል እና የስራ ዕድልን ይጎዳል በሚል በ12 ግዛቶች የቀረበውን ክስ ተከትሎ እንዲቆም ትዕዛዝ ሰጥተዋል። ፍርድ ቤቱ እነዚህ ግዛቶች ክሳቸውን በዝርዝር እንዲያቀርቡ ለሁለት ሳምንታት ጊዜ የሰጠ ሲሆን፣ የችሎት ቀጠሮም ለነሐሴ ወር ተይዟል። ውህደቱ እስከ መስከረም መጨረሻ ካልተጠናቀቀ ኩባንያው ከፍተኛ የገንዘብ ቅጣት የሚጠብቀው በመሆኑ፣ ይህ መዘግየት በፓራማውንት ላይ ትልቅ የገንዘብ ጫና ሊፈጥር ይችላል።
oromo: Abbaan seeraa tokko mootummoota gamtoomaniin 12 ta'an waldorgommii hir'isaa fi hojii dhabsiisa jechuun himannaa dhiyeessaniin walqabatee, walitti makamuun Paramount fi Warner Bros akka dhaabbatu ajajaniiru. Manni maree mootummoota kanaaf ragaa isaanii dhiyeeffachuuf torbee lamaaf yeroo kenne yoo ta'u, dhaddachiis ji'a Hagayyaa keessa kan godhamu ta'a. Walitti makamuun kun hanga dhuma ji'a Fulbaanaatti yoo hin xumaramne, Paramount kaffaltii guddaa waan irraa eeggamuuf, tursiisa kanaan miidhaa maallaqaa guddaa keessa galuu danda'a.

title: A tournament of contradictions: What did we learn at World Cup 2026?
english: Spain emerged as the champions of the 2026 World Cup after defeating Argentina in a final marked by an awkward interaction between US President Donald Trump and FIFA officials. The tournament was a blend of athletic brilliance and political tension, featuring both inspiring underdog stories and controversies regarding travel restrictions and refereeing. Ultimately, the event highlighted how football remains a powerful force that can unite global fans despite the complicated political landscape surrounding it.
amharic: ስፔን አርጀንቲናን በማሸነፍ የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች፤ የፍፃሜው ጨዋታም በአሜሪካ ፕሬዝዳንት ዶናልድ ትራምፕ እና በፊፋ ባለስልጣናት መካከል በተፈጠረ አስቸጋሪ ሁኔታ ይታወሳል። ውድድሩ አስደናቂ የስፖርት ክንውኖችን እና የፖለቲካ ውጥረቶችን ያዘለ ነበር፤ በተለይም በጉዞ ገደቦች እና በዳኝነት አወዛጋቢ ውሳኔዎች የተነሳ ትችቶች ቀርበውበታል። በአጠቃላይ ውድድሩ ውስብስብ የፖለቲካ ሁኔታዎች ቢኖሩም፣ እግር ኳስ ህዝቦችን በአንድነት የማሰባሰብ አቅም እንዳለው አሳይቷል።
oromo: Ispayin arjantiinaa injifachuun xumura tapha waancaa addunyaa bara 2026 injifatteetti, taphni xumuraas walitti bu'iinsa uumame gidduu pirezedaantii Ameerikaa Doonaald Tiraampii fi hoggantoota FIFA'n kan yaadatamu dha. Taphoonni kunneen ogummaa ispoortii fi dhiibbaa siyaasaa kan walitti qabate ture, keessattuu dhimmoota hayyama seenuu fi murtii abbaa seeraa irratti komiin cimaan tureera. Haata'u malee, taphni kun haala siyaasaa walxaxaa keessatti illee kubbaan miilaa humna namoota tokko gochuu danda'u akka qabu ragaa ta'eera.

title: Protests in Italy after Moroccan man dies during arrest
english: A 42-year-old Moroccan man named Abderrahim Fakir died in Bologna, Italy, after being restrained by police during an arrest. Footage of the incident has sparked widespread protests, with many comparing the event to the death of George Floyd in the United States. While the government has defended the police's actions, opposition leaders and activists are calling for a thorough investigation and greater accountability.
amharic: በጣሊያን ቦሎኛ ከተማ አብደራሂም ፋኪር የተባሉ የ42 ዓመት ሞሮኳዊ ዜጋ በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር በነበሩበት ወቅት ህይወታቸው አልፏል። የክስተቱ ቪዲዮ በዩናይትድ ስቴትስ የጆርጅ ፍሎይድን ሞት የሚያስታውስ በመሆኑ በሀገሪቱ ከፍተኛ ተቃውሞ ቀስቅሷል። መንግስት የፖሊሶችን ድርጊት ቢከላከልም፣ ተቃዋሚዎችና የሰብአዊ መብት ተሟጋቾች ጉዳዩ በገለልተኛ አካል እንዲጣራና ተጠያቂነት እንዲሰፍን እየጠየቁ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Magalaa Bologna kan Xaaliyaaniitti namni lammii Marookoo waggaa 42 Abderrahim Fakir jedhamu erga poolisiin qabamee booda lubbuun isaa darbeera. Viidiyoon yeroo inni qabamu mul’isu walfakkaataa ajjeechaa George Floyd kan Ameerikaatti raawwatamee waan fakkaatuuf, biyyattii keessatti mormii guddaan ka’eera. Mootummaan gocha poolisootaa kan ittise yoo ta’u, mormitoonniifi dhaabbileen mirga namoomaa garuu qorannoon hatattamaan akka gaggeeffamuufi ittigaafatamuun akka jiraatu gaafachaa jiru.

title: Everyday Authoritarianism Threatens Ethiopia’s Democratic Ambitions
english: Ethiopia's struggle with democracy is rooted in a deeply ingrained social culture that prioritizes blind obedience over critical thinking. From childhood, individuals are conditioned to view questioning as a sign of disrespect, a pattern that persists in schools, workplaces, and government institutions. This cycle of hierarchy suppresses open dialogue and hinders the country's progress toward a more democratic society.
amharic: የኢትዮጵያ የዴሞክራሲ ችግር የመነጨው ጥያቄን እንደ አለመታዘዝ በሚቆጥር እና አድርባይነትን በሚያበረታታ ጥልቅ ማህበራዊ አስተሳሰብ ነው። ከቤተሰብ ጀምሮ በትምህርት ቤት እና በስራ ቦታ የሚታየው ይህ የአሰራር ዘይቤ፣ ሰዎችን ሃሳብ ከመግለጽ እና ተገቢውን ጥያቄ ከማንሳት እንዲቆጠቡ ያደርጋል። ይህ ባህል ውይይትን በማፈን ሀገሪቱ ወደ እውነተኛ ዴሞክራሲ እንዳትሸጋገር እንቅፋት ሆኗል።
oromo: Rakkoon demokrasii Itoophiyaa keessatti mul'atu aadaa hawaasummaa gaaffii kaasuu akka tuffiitti ilaaluufi ajajamuufi bitamuu qofa irratti hundaa'e irraa kan maddeedha. Ijoollummaa irraa kaasee mana barnootaa fi bakka hojiitti namoonni yaada isaanii ibsuu irraa akka of qusatan kan godhu sirni kun, marii walabaa irratti gufuu ta'a. Amalli wal-caalmaa kana jajjabeessu kun biyyattiin gara sirna demokraasii dhugaatti akka hin ceene dhiibbaa godha.

title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
english: The Houthi movement in Yemen has declared a maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia, aiming to block Saudi vessels from passing through the strategic Bab al-Mandab Strait. The group claims this action is a direct response to a long-standing Saudi blockade on Yemeni ports and airports. This escalation follows recent missile attacks and heightens tensions in a conflict that has caused a severe humanitarian crisis for over a decade.
amharic: በየመን የሚንቀሳቀሱት የሁቲ ታጣቂዎች በሳውዲ አረቢያ ላይ የባህር ላይ እገዳ መጣላቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ይህ እርምጃ ሳውዲ አረቢያ በየመን ወደቦች እና አየር ማረፊያዎች ላይ የጣለችውን እገዳ ለመበቀል የተወሰደ መሆኑን ቡድኑ ገልጿል። ውሳኔው በባብ ኤል-ማንደብ የባህር መስመር ላይ የሳውዲ መርከቦችን እንቅስቃሴ የሚገድብ ሲሆን፣ ይህም ከአስር አመታት በላይ የቆየውን የሁለቱ ወገኖች ግጭት ይበልጥ አባብሶታል።
oromo: Humni Hutiin Yaman, sa'aatii kana sa'aatii xumuraa akka ta'etti, markaboota Sa'udii iratti dhiibbaa fi dhorkaa galaanaa kan labse ta'uu beeksiseera. Hutiin tarkaanfii kana kan fudhate, Sa'udiin buufataalee fi dirree xiyyaaraa Yamanirratti dhorkaa kaa'uu ishee mormuuf akka ta'e ibseera. Labsii kanaan, Hutiin karaa galaanaa Bab al-Mandab keessatti markaboota Sa'udii akka dhorku kan beekame yoo ta'u, kunis waldhabdee biyyoota lamaanii fi rakkoo namoomaa biyyattii keessatti guddachaa jiruuf xumura kan hin argine ta'uu isaa agarsiisa.

title: Rare identical quadruplets born in Australia
english: A 34-year-old woman in Australia has given birth to rare, naturally-conceived identical quadruplets at the Royal Brisbane and Women's Hospital. The four girls were delivered safely via caesarean section at 28 weeks, a result experts describe as incredibly rare given the shared placenta. Both the mother and her four newborn babies are currently healthy and recovering in the neonatal intensive care unit.
amharic: በአውስትራሊያ የሚገኙ የ34 ዓመት እናት በአይነቱ ለየት ያለ የተፈጥሮ አራት መንታ ሴት ልጆችን በሮያል ብሪስቤን እና ሴቶች ሆስፒታል ወለዱ። ዶክተሮች እንደገለጹት አራቱም ህጻናት አንድ አይነት የእንግዴ ልጅ የሚጋሩ በመሆናቸው በ15 ሚሊዮን እርግዝናዎች ውስጥ አንድ ጊዜ ብቻ የሚያጋጥም በጣም ብርቅዬ ክስተት ነው። አራቱም ጨቅላዎች እና እናታቸው በጥሩ የጤና ሁኔታ ላይ የሚገኙ ሲሆን፣ ህጻናቱ አስፈላጊው ክትትል እንዲደረግላቸው በሆስፒታሉ የፅኑ ህክምና ክፍል ውስጥ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Dubartiin umrii 34 biyya Awustiraaliyaa keessa jiraattu tokko, mana yaala Royal Brisbane and Women's Hospital keessatti ijoollee durbaa afur kan wal fakkaatan karaa uumamaa deesseetti. Ogeeyyiin fayyaa akka ibsanitti, ijoolleen kun afuranuu kan wal fakkaatan fi kan uumaman haadha tokko irraa waan ta'eef, kunis garaa keessatti yeroo 15 miliyoona keessatti si'a tokko qofa kan mudatu ta'uu ibsameera. Haati fi ijoolleen kun afuranuu yeroo ammaa fayyaa kan qaban yoo ta'u, ijoolleen kunis mana yaalichaa keessatti hordoffii fayyaa barbaachisaa taasifamaafii jira.

title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
english: Ismael Zambada, a top co-founder of Mexico's Sinaloa drug cartel, has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was captured in 2024 following an elaborate sting operation and later pleaded guilty to major drug trafficking charges. Alongside his life sentence, he was ordered to pay $15 billion in profits earned from his illegal criminal activities.
amharic: የሜክሲኮው የሲናሎአ አደንዛዥ ዕፅ ካርቴል ተባባሪ መስራች ኢስማኤል ዛምባዳ በዩኤስ አሜሪካ ፍርድ ቤት የዕድሜ ልክ እስራት ተፈረደበት። በ2024 በተደረገ ልዩ ወጥመድ ከተያዘ በኋላ በአደንዛዥ ዕፅ ዝውውር ወንጀል ጥፋተኛ ሆኖ በመገኘቱ ነው ቅጣቱ የተወሰነበት። ከእስራት ቅጣቱ በተጨማሪ፣ በህገ-ወጥ መንገድ ካገኘው የ15 ቢሊዮን ዶላር ትርፍ እንዲከፍልም ፍርድ ቤቱ ትእዛዝ አስተላልፏል።
oromo: Ismaa'eel Zaambaadaa, hundeeessaa fi geggeessaa dhaabbata yakka darbiinsa qoricha sammuu namaa hadoochu (Sinaloa Cartel) kan Meeksiko keessatti beekamu, mana murtii UStiin hidha waggaa guutuu itti murteeffame. Nama kana bara 2024 tooftaa xaxamaa ta'een qabamee erga qabamee booda, yakka seeraan ala qoricha sammuu namaa hadoochu guuruun yakkamuu isaa fudhateera. Hidhaa kana malees, qabeenya yakka kana irraa argate keessaa doolaara biliyoona 15 akka kaffalu mana murtichaatti ajajameera.

title: Petrol prices climb as US–Iran tensions disrupt markets
english: Global oil and petrol prices are surging due to renewed military tensions between the United States and Iran, which have disrupted critical shipping routes. Concerns over tanker movement through the Strait of Hormuz and potential blockades in the Red Sea have led to a sharp rise in fuel costs for American consumers. Despite recent reports of declining inflation, gas prices in the US have now climbed to an average of four dollars per gallon.
amharic: በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል ያለው ውጥረት እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ እና የንግድ መርከቦች ማለፊያ መስመሮች በመስተጓጎላቸው የነዳጅ ዋጋ በአለም አቀፍ ደረጃ እየጨመረ ነው። በሆርሙዝ የባህር ዳርቻ እና በቀይ ባህር ላይ ያለው የፀጥታ ስጋት የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለቱን በመጉዳቱ የነዳጅ ዋጋ እንዲንር አድርጓል። ምንም እንኳን ባለፈው ሳምንት የዋጋ ግሽበት ቀንሶ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ በአሜሪካ በአሁኑ ወቅት በአማካይ የአንድ ጋሎን ቤንዚን ዋጋ ወደ አራት ዶላር ከፍ ብሏል።
oromo: Walitti buutiin Ameerikaa fi Iraan gidduutti uumame akkasumas dhiibbaan karaa bishaan irraa irratti taasifame gatiin boba'aa addunyaa irraatti akka dabalu taasiseera. Dhiphina dhangala'aa bishaan Hormuz fi daandiin galaana diimaa irratti soda jiruun wal qabatee gatiin boba'aa dabaluun isaa uummata Ameerikaa irratti dhiibbaa uumeera. Gatiin infileshiinii gadi bu'uun isaa gabaafamee tureyyuu, amma qabxii gatii boba'aa Ameerikaa keessatti gaaloona tokkoof gara doolaara afuritti guddateera.

title: FIFA World Cup: Five key takeaways from 2026 edition won by Spain
english: Spain emerged as the champions of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating Argentina in the final match. The tournament was significantly influenced by geopolitical tensions between the host nation, the United States, and Iran, which caused various diplomatic and travel complications. Despite concerns regarding the expanded 48-team format, the competition successfully highlighted that the skill gap between elite nations and smaller teams is shrinking.
amharic: ስፔን በአርጀንቲና ላይ ድል በመቀዳጀት የ2026 የፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊ ሆናለች። ውድድሩ አስተናጋጇ አሜሪካ እና ኢራን መካከል በነበረው የፖለቲካ ውጥረት ምክንያት በዲፕሎማሲያዊ እና በቪዛ ችግሮች ታጅቦ ነበር። ምንም እንኳን የቡድኖች ቁጥር ወደ 48 ማደጉ ስጋት ፈጥሮ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ ውድድሩ በኃያላን እና በሌሎች ቡድኖች መካከል ያለው የክህሎት ልዩነት እየጠበበ መምጣቱን አሳይቷል።
oromo: Ispeeniin tapha xumuraa irratti Arjentiinaa injifachuun waancaa Addunyaa FIFA bara 2026 fudhatteetti. Taphoonni kun biyya keessummeessituu Ameerikaafi biyya Iraan gidduutti walitti bu'iinsa siyaasaa tureefi dhimma visaarratti rakkoowwan mudataniin miidhamee ture. Gareewwan 48 hirmaachuun isaa shakkii uumee tureyyuu, taphoonni kun biyyoota gurguddoofi garee xixiqqaa gidduutti dandeettiin taphattootaa walcinaa ga'aa akka jiru mirkaneesseera.

title: Mexican drug lord Ismael ‘El Mayo’ Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
